42.3 S4TWL - Annexing Solution for Israel

Application Components:XX-CSC-IL

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number               Note Description
Business Impact  2437547                   S4TWL - Annexing Solution for Israel

Symptom

The SAP LOCILERP Add-on (software component LOCILERP) has been integrated to
S4H On Premise Edition as of version S4H OP 1610.

Here new Business Functions and switches have been provided to make Area Menus,
IMG nodes etc. switchable.

Reason and Prerequisites

                                                                                               Page | 1043
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

This note is relevant for you when your start release for the system conversion is an ERP
release or is S/4HANA Finance release, where you have the Israeli annexing solution
implemented in system via transports solution or via LOCILERP add-on.

It is not relevant if your start release is S/4HANA.

Solution

Description

Israeli Annexing Solution is an On Premise solution provided as LOCILERP Add-On for
the Israeli market based on Inflation Adjustment Law that was published in Israel during
the 80's.

Business Process related information

Annexing calculation is done via a central FM that is based on Annexing Packages which
includes all the relevant conditions/rules for the calculation, and based it on Indexes,
currency exchange rate and on SD Price List

The annexing calculation is in used in several modules in ERP environment as follow:

    Logistic Invoice Verification

    Sales and Distribution Billing Process

    Loans Cash Flow

    Treasury Cash Flow

    Flexible Real Estate Contract Adjustment

The annexing solution in all its modules is based on the Master Data of Annexing
Packages and on a local customizing as well.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

The SAP LOCILERP add-on is shipped with the core product starting with SAP
S/4HANA, on premise edition 1610 (S4CORE 101). For more information, see the
attached business functions description: "TRM Localization for Annexing in Israel", "FI,
LO Localization for Annexing in Israel". And country-specific release notes: 2349004,
2298073 and 2323282.

                                                                                               Page | 1044
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

In addition, pay attention that LOCILERP modifications should be discarded from system
in the upgrade process from Add-on solution to SAP S/4HANA by performing the reset
to original in the Modification Adjustment transaction (e.g., SPAU).

42.4 S4TWL - Funds Management Portugal

Application Components:XX-CSC-PT-PSM-FM

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number             Note Description
Business Impact  2469984
                                         S4TWL: Availability of Portuguese
                                         Public Sector Funds Management in
                                         SAP S/4HANA On-Premise 1709

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA and are using the
functionality described in this SAP Note. The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification
Item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

This SAP Note is relevant for you when your starting release for the system conversion is
a SAP ERP release or a SAP S/4HANA Finance release, where you have the Localization
for Portuguese Public Sector solution implemented in your system via transport solution
or via LOCPTFM add-on.

It is not relevant for theSAP S/4HANA 1709 FPS00 release.

Business Process related information

The SAP LOCPTFM Add-on (software component LOCPTFM) has been integrated into
SAP S/4HANA, as of release SAP S/4HANA 1709.

However, the Portuguese Public Sector Funds Management features are available as of
SAP S/4HANA 1709 FPS01 with the following restrictions:

    As a Customer who used the integration between Logistics documents and Funds
         Management with LOCPTFM and is planning to move to SAP S/4HANA, please
                                                                                               Page | 1045
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

         note that in SAP S/4HANA, the Funds Management integration with Materials
         Management has been enhanced to accomodate local version Portugal
         requirements. However, a document chain initiated with the LOCPTFM Add-on
         cannot be migrated to SAP S/4HANA and must first be closed in the Add-on
         system. This restriction does not apply to customers with new installations, or
         new document chains initiated in SAP S/4HANA.
         As a Customer who used the integration between Logistics documents and Funds
         Management with LOCPTFM and is planning to move to SAP S/4HANA, please
         note that in SAP S/4HANA there is a new technical solution to support this
         integration but no migration tool is currently available. For new processes
         (starting with the pre-commitment document) the new functionality can be used
         but not for an unfinished document chain.

             Solution: as of SAP S/4HANA 1709 SPS03, SAP S/4HANA 1809 FPS01 or
                  the after the installation of SAP Note 2674217, this restriction no longer
                  applies. Please refer to that SAP Note for more information.

    The Funds Management (FM) integration with Human Resources (HR) feature of the
         SAP LOCPTFM Add-on (software component LOCPTFM) is no longer
         considered in SAP S/4HANA. For alternative solutions, see Position Budgeting
         and Control (PBC).

             Solution: as of SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS01 or after the installation of SAP
                  Note 3236088, this restriction no longer applies. Please refer to that SAP
                  Note for more information.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

For detailed information on the system installation/conversion of the Portuguese Public
Sector Funds Management, available in SAP S/4HANA 1709 FPS01, please see SAP
Note 2595915, Customer Installation/Conversion Procedures for Portuguese LOCPTFM
in S/4HANA On-Premise.

Please note that with the integration of SAP LOCPTFM into SAP S/4HANA 1709, some
ABAP objects of the respective LOCPTFM packages have become obsolete. Therefore,
run the ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) using the latest simplification item DB content and
remove all detected usages of the LOCPTFM objects from your custom code.

42.6 S4TWL - Replacement of legal reports with SAP S/4HANA ACR
Application Components:FI-LOC-SRF-RUN

Related Notes:

                                                                                               Page | 1047
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2835816
                              Replacement of existing legal reports in
                              SAP S/4HANA for Advanced
                              Compliance Reporting (ACR) based
                              reports

Symptom

In SAP S/4HANA, some of the existing legal notes have been replaced by SAP
S/4HANA for advanced compliance reporting (ACR) based reports. However, the
replacement of reports does not apply to all the countries/regions and reports. Some of
the existing country/region - specific reports are still relevant.

To understand if the activity "Implement the generic ACR Fiori app succeeding the
deprecated legal reports" described in Simplification item SI5: GSFIN_LEG_REP
(S4TWL - Replacement of legal reports with SAP S/4HANA ACR) needs to be
performed after the system upgrade, please check if you are using any combination of
report and country/region listed in note 2480067.

Solution

Advanced Compliance Reporting is a unique and competitive legal reporting solution that
allows you to manage your regulatory requirements across the globe. The solution offers
features that ensure your complex and diverse legal reporting needs are addressed in
uniform, easy to use, and efficient manner. As an all-encompassing global reporting
solution, advanced compliance reporting provides a holistic and real time view of your
compliance status across countries and empowers you to draw meaningful inferences.
One of biggest strengths of advanced compliance reporting is that it offers an
extensibility platform to SAP partners and customers to create new legal reports or
enhance the existing reports. For more details about advanced compliance reporting and
country-specific report features, see the documentation note 2465179 (for OP 1610) and
the SAP help portal. In case of any generic questions/feedback, raise an incident in
component FI-LOC-SRF-RUN.

Other Terms

S/4HANA, ACR, Advanced compliance reporting, Legal Reports, SAP S/4HANA for
advanced compliance reporting, Run Advanced Compliance Reports, Define Advanced
Compliance Reports, Replacement

Solution
Description

                                                                                       Page | 1049
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

"SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements" is part of the
SAP S/4HANA compatibility scope, which comes with limited use rights. For more
details on the compatibility scope and its expiry date and links to further information
please refer to SAP note 2269324. In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note
2269324, SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements can be found

This means that you may choose another SAP solution or a partner solution as successor
of "SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements" before expiry (read
more in SAP note 2269324).

This note shall provide an overview to which extend the current scope of "SAP ERP,
add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements" maps with other SAP solutions and
how you may switch to the alternative functionality considering the respective scope.

This note will regularly be updated to reflect more details on the alternative functionality
and the migration.

Business Process related information

Scope of SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements

    "SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements 1.0" is a stand-alone
         solution. It is not related to the SAP standard solution "SAP Starter Solution". For
         further information on the "SAP Starter Solution" see SAP Note 2304519 -
         SAFT-PL: SAP solution strategy and release dates guidance.

    "SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements 1.0" is comprised of
         two parts:

             ERP add-on "PLVAT": This solution is responsible for the generation of the
                  SAF-T XML files.

             Desktop Application "eTransfer" (also named "PLVAT_DESKTOP"): This
                  application is responsible for the transmission of SAF-T XML files to
                  the Polish tax authorities.

    The solution comprises data extraction only from the following SAP ERP and SAP
         S/4HANA modules:

                                                                                               Page | 1050
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

             SAP FI

             SAP MM

             SAP SD

For more information about this solution, see SAP Note 2351241 - SAF-T Poland:
Release Strategy for "SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements (Private
Cloud Edition/On-Premise)".

SAF-T Strategy: "SAP Document and Reporting Compliance" future direction

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance is SAP's strategic solution for e-invoicing
and statutory reporting. Please read more about SAP's SAF-T Strategy in the SAP Note
3526880.

For Poland, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance already covers PEF/PEPPOL and
KSeF. For SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers, it also includes SAF-T
reporting in Poland (see SAP Note 2926588).

SAP plans to extend SAF-T Poland coverage to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
and SAP S/4HANA (this is the current state of planning and can be changed by SAP at
any point in time without further notice). Currently, SAF-T Poland functionality for these
systems is provided via the software component PLVAT with the SAP Add-on for Polish
SAF-T Regulatory Requirements.

It is strongly recommended to plan the implementation leveraging SAP Document and
Reporting Compliance capabilities, as PLVAT with all software versions ("SAP ERP,
add-on f Polish SAF-T rgltr req", "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory
requirements, private cloud edition", "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T reg req,pto", "Cloud
SAP ERP, add-on Polish SAF-T rgltr") will be out of maintenance after Dec. 31, 2027. A
list of the already supported compliance tasks, including reports for Poland in SAP
Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP S/4HANA, can be found on the SAP Help
Portal.

The future functionality planned for Q1 and Q2 2025 for SAP Document and Reporting
Compliance and SAF-T reporting in Poland can be found on the SAP Road Map
Explorer.

Information on SAF-T Poland: Changes in accounting file JPK_KR (extended
JPK_KR_PD file and JPK_ST_KR file with a new structure for fixed assets) as of 2025
can be found in the regulatory change manager.

                                                                                               Page | 1051
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

The scope of the alternative functionality "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory
requirements, private cloud edition"

The solution "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements, private cloud
edition" has the same functionality as the current solution including the desktop
application "eTransfer".

Customers migrating to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition need to convert their SAF-
T add-on license to "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements, private
cloud edition". This license is off the pricelist and will be closed after Q4 2024.

PLVAT with all software versions ("SAP ERP, add-on f Polish SAF-T rgltr req", "SAP
add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements, private cloud edition", "SAP add-on
for Polish SAF-T reg req,pto", "Cloud SAP ERP, add-on Polish SAF-T rgltr") will be out
of maintenance after Dec. 31, 2027. Until that date, SAP plans to provide legal changes
and maintenance for the 'SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements' for
SAP ERP and PCE solutions (this is current state of planning and can be changed by SAP
at any point in time without further notice).

Please read SAP Note 3526880.

The scope of the alternative functionality "SAP Starter Solution"

The "SAP Starter Solution" comprises SAP ERP Finance and Logistics data.

It covers two stages of the end-to-end process

    Settings for Data Extraction (definition of relevant parameters that control the data
         extraction)

    Data extraction (collection of relevant transactional data needed for file creation)

Note that the file creation, and file submission step is not covered in the ,,SAP Starter
Solution". For this reason, the logic required for creating the XML file will be within
customer's responsibility.

For guidelines about using ,,SAP Starter Solution", please refer to SAP Note 2304519 -
SAFT-PL: SAP solution strategy and release dates guidance. This note will also be
regularly updated regarding any future roadmap decisions.

                                                                                               Page | 1052
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Required and Recommended Action(s)

As SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements can be used until the
expiry date of the compatibility pack license (read more in SAP note 2269324), it is up to
each customer to decide, with which of the coming SAP S/4HANA releases they want to
switch to the designated alternative functionality of another SAP solution or to switch to
an alternative partner solution.

Depending on your future landscape, you have the following options concerning SAP
solutions:

    S/4HANA on-premise: "SAP Document and Reporting Compliance", "SAP Starter
         Solution"

    S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: "SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, "SAP
         Starter Solution", "SAP add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements, private
         cloud edition" (deprecated, end of maintenance after Dec. 31, 2027)

    S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: "SAP Document and Reporting Compliance"

Sufficient switching time should be considered.

For guideline about uninstalling SAP ERP, add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory
requirements, please refer to SAP Note 2869393 - Uninstalling ABAP Add-On PLVAT.

42.8 S4TWL - Russia Manage Additional Payment Attributes app

Application Components:FI-LOC-FI-RU

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number         Note Description
Business Impact  3120536
                                     S4TWL - Russia Manage Additional
                                     Payment Attributes app

                                                              Page | 1053
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion or an upgrade to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise 1909
edition. The following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

This note is relevant for you when your start release for the system conversion is an ERP
release or SAP S/4HANA on-premise 1809 edition or lower releases.

It is not relevant if your start release is S/4HANA on-premise 1909 or later.

Solution

Business Value

New solution to maintain document attributes for Payments to tax authorities before
output in Payment Medium.

New Manage Additional Payment Attributes app offers you the following benefits:

    Unified and simplified user experience via Fiori interface

    Improved Mobility. The switch to Fiori delivers advantages to mobile employees.
         Fiori's simple interface lets users work with touch screens.

    Increases in Productivity Ł Fiori-designed interfaces are easier, so they enable more
         productive work.

    Integration with a Manage Journal Entry app that is main report to see and check
         postings.

Description

For tax payments attributes in S/4HANA on-premise 1909 and future releases Manage
Additional Payment Attributes app has to be used:

    Find your Payment document in the Manage Journal Entries app and click on the
         journal entry number.

    Select Manage Additional Payment Attributes and enter payment attributes or change
         existing one.

                                                                                               Page | 1054
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

For more information see Tax Payments help page.

Business Process related information

Manage Additional Payment Attributes app replaces the solution:

    Payment attributes screen during Financial Document posting and Financial
         Document change (Open FI Functional Modules J_3RF_PDOCV_2218 and
         J_3RF_PDOC1430)

Note that depending on your SAP S/4HANA release and planned end of support date
previous solution will become obsolete. After end of support date these solutions will not
be updated by new legal changes or corrections. We highly recommend that you use
the Fiori based apps instead of the old previous solution.

SAP S/4HANA on-premise 1809 and previous releases
No planned end of support date

SAP S/4HANA on-premise 1909 and future releases
Only Manage Tax Payment Attributes Fiori will be supported.
Payment attributes screen during Financial Document posting and Financial Document
change (Open FI Functional Modules J_3RF_PDOCV_2218 and J_3RF_PDOC1430) is
obsolete within these releases.

Required and Recommended Actions:

    Set up new Fiori app "Manage Additional Payment Attributes (Refer to SAP Note
         2931354).

    If you have made customer enhancements to the obsoleted Open FI function modules,
         check if you need to reimplement them in the new Fiori App. Custom logic can be
         implemented in the BAdI FIGLO_PMNT_FIELDS.

    Train your users.

How to Determine Relevancy

Check that you have configured the Open FI module J_3RF_PDOCV_2218 for the event
2218 and Open FI module J_3RF_PDOC1430 for the event 1430 or you have entries in
Payment Attributes table J_3RF_PLAT.

Other Terms

42.9 S4TWL - SAF-T RO: Replacement of ABAP Report Solution with DRC
      Solution

Application Components:FI-LOC-SAF-RO, FI-LOC-FI-RO

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  3256877
                              S4TWL - SAF-T RO: Replacement of
                              ABAP Report Solution with DRC
                              Solution

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA and are using the
functionality described in this SAP Note.

To understand if the activity "Implement the generic DRC Fiori app succeeding the
deprecated legal reports" described in Simplification item SI9: GSFIN_SAFT_RO
(S4TWL - SAF-T RO: Replacement of ABAP Report Solution with DRC Solution) needs
to be performed after the system upgrade, please check if you are using any combination
of report and country/region listed in note 2480067

Solution

Description

This SAP Note is relevant for you when your starting release for the system conversion is
an SAP ERP release or an SAP S/4HANA Finance release, where you have the ERP
SAF-T for Romania solution implemented (transactions SAFTN_E & SAFTN_G) in your
system.

Business Process related information

In S/4 Hana, the requirement of generating SAF-T files according to the legal format of
Romania is covered by the Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) Application. For
this reason, the SAF-T Romania solution of ERP (transactions SAFTN_E & SAFTN_G)
is not to be used anymore and shall be replaced by the corresponding report defined in the
DRC app.

There is no need to migrate data. After the transition to S/4 Hana, it is still possible to
generate SAF-T files for previous reporting periods using the DRC application, no matter
if files have been generated for the same reporting period before the transition or not

                                                                                               Page | 1056
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Required and Recommended Action(s)

To use the DRC report for SAF-T Romania, some general configuration settings have to
be made, like for example defining the required reporting entities. Refer to the
corresponding help document.

The ERP SAF-T solution for Romania offers a monitoring app (transaction SAFTN_M).
This transaction is not supported anymore in SAP S/4HANA. If you need to keep the
details about extracted data and generated files, we recommend to download the
monitoring details before the transition. In addition, we recommend to clean up the
extraction data using transaction SAFTN_D before the transition to save database storage
space as these entries are not used anymore after the transition to SAP S/4HANA

Please note that with the transition from SAP ERPSAF-T solution for Romania to SAP
DRC, some ABAP objects ofpackage /CEECV/RO_SAFT have become obsolete.
Therefore, run the ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) using the latest simplification item DB
content and remove all detected usages of the correspondingobjects from your custom
code.

In case you have implemented any extension to the selection logic according to note
3237660, check the need for a corresponding extension after the transition. In case you
still require an extension to the standard logic, use the available DRC extension
techniques to implement them. Find more information on how to do this in the
corresponding help document.

Other Terms

Globalization, Localization, CEE Add-on, RO, SAF-T RO, SAF-T, ANAF 1783/2021,
Romania

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Business Value

The SAP Tax Declaration Framework for Brazil solution is an integrated tax management
solution that helps Brazilian companies to be in compliance while saving time and money
by reducing the operational costs with auditing, analyzes and assessments of fiscal
information; by eliminating direct and indirect costs with tax management software; and
by offering greater accuracy on fiscal planning and taxes payment.

TAXBRA tax procedure is a more flexible and up-to-date solution.

Description

The following functionality related to Country Version for Brazil is not available in SAP
S/4HANA, on-premise Edition 1511:

Legal Books and Fixed Asset taxes credit (ICMS and PIS/COFINS).

TAXBRJ Tax procedure has restricted maintenance but it is still available for
    compatibility reasons.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

SAP recommends using the following:

SAP Tax Declaration Framework for Fiscal and Accounting Legal Reporting.

TAXBRA tax procedure for the tax calculation.

Note: SAP Tax Declaration Framework is part of the Compatible Add-ons and requires
an additional license.

                                       eDocument Framework: Migration from
                                       SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA

Symptom

You have implemented the eDocument Framework in SAP ERP and want to migrate to
SAP S/4HANA.

This SAP Note contains additional steps that you must perform in order to migrate the
eDocument Framework and the country solutions that you have implemented.

Reason and Prerequisites

Reason:

In SAP S/4HANA, the SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF) Add-On has been
integrated as standard component. The AIF message index tables ZEDOAIFIDXREQ
and ZEDOAIFIDXRES have been replaced by standard tables EDOAIFIDXREQ and

transport the changes to the subsequent systems (for example quality and production).

You must run the migration progam EDOC_COPY_AIF_MSG_INDEX_TAB in each
client of every system where entries are available in tables ZEDOAIFIDXREQ and
ZEDOAIFIDXRES.

44.Industry - Cross

44.1 S4TWL - Billing Document Number and Invoicing Document Number
      Change of Type

Application Components:FI-CA-INV

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  3463454
                                  S4TWL - Billing Document Number and
                                  Invoicing Document Number Change of
                                  Type

Symptom

You use Convergent Invoicing (FI-CA-INV) and are upgrading to SAP S/4HANA
release 2023 or a later release from SAP S/4HANA release 2022 or earlier.

During this upgrade, the data types of the billing document number and invoicing
document number have been changed from data type NUMC length 12 to data type
CHAR length 12.

This change is a technical prerequisite for a potential future use of alphanumeric
document numbers in Convergent Invoicing.

Reason and Prerequisites

You use FI-CA-INV and are upgrading to SAP S/4HANA release 2023 or a later release
from SAP S/4HANA release 2022 or earlier.

Task: Check that Convergent Invoicing is active in your system.

                                                                                               Page | 1060
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Procedure: Go to the implementation guide using transaction FICAIMG --> Convergent
Invoicing --> Invoicing --> Define Invoicing Process. If there is a invoicing process
configured, then this SAP Note is relevant for you.

Changes to Customer Coding Required

The domain change has several technical consequences. This note contains a detailed list
of the different technical consequences of the type change, and how you must adapt your
coding. The two following aspects illustrate the necessary code changes:

Checks that a Billing/Invoicing Document Number is Assigned - IS INITIAL Checks

The ABAP statements "IS INITIAL" and "IS NOT INITIAL" can no longer be used to
check if fields of type BILLDOCNO_KK or INVDOCNO_KK are empty.

The previous initial value of billing/invoicing document number was '000000000000',
while the new initial value will be 'space'. Since the existing database entries containing
the old initial value are not updated, either the old or the new initial value can occur and
must be checked.

Solution

Business-Process Related Information

The change of the data type of the billing and invoicing document number has no
business-related impact.

44.1.1 Required and Recommended Actions

To avoid any errors in the system behaviour due to the change of the data types, you need
to adapt your customer coding for this change. The adaption of the initial value check
needs to be carried out.

What to Do Before the Upgrade

Please ensure that you update the check logic to the most recent version by implementing
all relevant SAP Notes from SAP Note 2436688, otherwise you might get wrong or
missing check results.

Whether you are using the initial check or select statement, please investigate if you have
set BILLDOCNO or INVDOCNO to 'empty' in your customer coding. The change of the
underlying technical domain in the ABAP dictionary could lead to changed behavior
when moving billing/invoicing document numbers into different types. The billing and
invoicing document header store references to subsequent documents in fields such
as REVERSEDDOC, REVERSALDOC, ADJUSTMENTDOC, ADJUSTEDDOC.

                                                                                               Page | 1061
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Besides BILLDOCNO and INVDOCNO, you must investigate the use of these fields in
your custom coding as well.

As described before, the initial value of the fields BILLDOCNO and INVDOCNO will
be 'space' rather than '000000000000' for new documents. However, old values on the
database will not be updated during the upgrade process. This means that the code
checking whether the fields BILLDOCNO and INVDOCNO are empty or not, needs to
check for both values.

ABAP Code Examples

The following table contains a list of potential code patterns along with a correction
proposal and reasoning for the custom code adjustment.

44.2 S4TWL - BRIM - Billing of Event Detail Records (EDR)

Application Components:FI-CA-BI

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number     Note Description
Business Impact  2271210
                                 S4TWL - BRIM - Billing of Event Detail
                                 Records (EDR)

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

EDR Management is used to transfer event detail records (EDR) from an external system,
manage the received information and prepare it for billing.

The BRIM solution covers CRM, CI / FI-CA (ERP) and SAP Convergent Charging
components/systems. It was developed to charge and bill single events like Toll Collects
or downloads. The Event Detail Records solution was replaced by BIT BILLING in
2008.

Business Process related information
No influence on business processes expected. All EDR customers are informed.
Required and Recommended Action(s)

                                                                                               Page | 1064
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

To check if you use EDR Management, call the transaction SE16 and check for entries in
the table DFKKBIBILLACC_H.

Ensure that no fields contained in structure FKKBIINVBILL_I_DATA are used directly
or indicretly in custom code and/or BRF(+)-Implementations to avoid short dumps.

44.3 S4TWL - BRIM - Common Object Layer (COL)

Application Components:FI-CA

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number          Note Description
Business Impact  2270317
                                      S4TWL - BRIM - Common Object Layer
                                      (COL)

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

The Common Object Layer Framework (COL framework) can be used to distribute data
(e.g. master data, provider contracts) from the SAP CRM System to the SAP Convergent
Charging and SAP ERP System. In SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition the distribution
between these systems is done directly, the framework is not provided any more.

The BRIM solution covers CRM, FI-CA (ERP) and SAP Convergent Charging
components/systems.

The Common Object Layer was developed in SAP_APPL to provide the technical
possibility to distribute master data from ERP to SAP Convergent Charging without
using the software component FI-CA. However, no customer used this feature. The
BRIM solution is always used with the FI-CA or CI component. Thus, the Common
Object Layer is not available in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The distribution of
objects is directly done in the software component FI-CA now.

Business Process related information

                                               Page | 1065
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

No influence on business processes expected for customers: the master data distribution
still works in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

To check if you distribute master data with the help of the COL framework without using
the component FI-CA, call the transaction SE16 to check the table BADIIMPL_ENH.
Enter "ISX_MD_COL_SCENARIO" and "ISX_MD_COL_ADAPTER" in the field
BADI_NAME. Check if there are any entries starting with Z* or Y* in the column
BADI_IMPL (BAdI Implementation).

44.4 S4TWL - BRIM - Integration with FSCM Biller Direct (FI-CA)

Application Components:FI-CA

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2271233
                              S4TWL - BRIM - Integration with FSCM
                              Biller Direct (FI-CA)

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

With the integration of SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable (FI-CA) with
FSCM Biller Direct it is possible to offer end-customers the convenience of receiving
invoices, viewing account statuses, and making payments online as a self-
service. Integration of FSCM Biller Direct with BRIM/FI-CA is part of the SAP
S/4HANA compatibility scope, which comes with limited usage rights. For more details
on the compatibility scope and it's expiry date and links to further information please
refer to SAP note 2269324. In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note 2269324,
"BRIM - Integration with FSCM Biller Direct" can be found under the ID 437.

Business Process related information

The functionality Biller Direct with FI-CA is not the target architecture, but still available
and can be used within SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition.

                                                                                               Page | 1066
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Required and Recommended Action(s)
To check if you use FSCM Biller Direct, call the transaction SE16 to check for entries in
the table DEBPPEVENTLOG.
Customers are using normally own branded web based portals. SAP therefore
alternatively offers APIs which are available with SAP S/4HANA on-premise 2021:

    Managing Contract Accounts
    Managing Provider Contracts
    Managing Documents
    Managing Installment Plans and Promise-2-Pay
    Managing Dispute Cases
    Sending Disconnection and Reconnection Request
    Customer-Self-Services, e.g. payment via credit card or paypal
    Integration with External Collection Agencies
    Integration with External Cash Desks
    Payment List for Business Partner in Contract Accounting
    Invoice List for Business Partner in Contract Accounting
See SAP help portal for more information.

44.5 S4TWL - BRIM - Solution Sales and Billing

Application Components:SD-BIL-IV-CB, FI-CAX

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number                 Note Description
Business Impact  2271236
                                             S4TWL - BRIM - Solution Sales and
                                             Billing

Symptom

                                                Page | 1067
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

The BRIM/Hybris Billing solution covers CRM, CI / FI-CA (ERP) and SAP Convergent
Charging components/systems.

The creation of provider contracts starts in CRM. For the integration of provider contracts
in SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable, SAP Convergent Invoicing and
finally SD Billing with FI-AR, the provider contracts need additional information for
the processing in SD. In addition to that, business agreements that are assigned to a
business partner need to be created automatically in the background without replication in
CRM. As the follow up processing of CI Billing Documents in SD Billing is currently not
available in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition, this feature is not provided. Billing and
invoicing of consumption data is still possible in FI-CA but not with SD and FI-AR.

In addition, the BRIM SD deployment variant was developed to invoice consumption
data also in SD billing with accounting in FI-AR. This solution is currently not available
in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. Therefore, the additions on the provider contract
with SD Billing relevant data and the background creation of contract accounts in ERP
without existing contract accounts in CRM are not required.

UPDATE:

Meanwhile, the integration of CI Billing Documents in SAP Convergent Invoicing into
SD Billing is available for S/4HANA in the form of "SAP S/4HANA for Subscription
Billing, Sales and Distribution Option 1.0" as part of Hybris Billing. For further details
please check note 2347269 - "Release stategy of the ABAP Add-On SOLINVE 800".
Therefore, the business function FICAX_SOLESALESBILL has been reenabled and set
to customer switchable. For further details check note 2348426 - "Reactivation of
Business Function FICAXSOLSALESBILL".

Required and Recommended Action(s)

To check if you use Solution Sales and Billing, call the transaction SE16 to check for
entries in table /SOIN/CI_DOCFLOW.

                                                                                               Page | 1068
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

44.6 S4TWL - BRIM Ł Immediate Master Data Replication to SAP
      Convergent Charging

Application Components:FI-CA

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2271238
                              S4TWL - BRIM Ł Immediate Master
                              Data Replication to SAP Convergent
                              Charging

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

In SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition the master data replication from FI-CA to SAP
Convergent Charging is only supported as joint replication. For example, master data
(business partners, contract accounts, prepaid accounts) is only replicated to SAP
Convergent Charging if the data for the related provider contract is received in FI-CA.
This means that the master data of business partners, contract accounts and prepaid
accounts cannot be replicated immediately and independently of each other to SAP
Convergent Charging any more.

Business Process related information

No influence on business process since the master data replication (as Joint Master Data
Replication approach) still works in S/4HANA on-premise.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

One of the following business functions needs to be activated:

    FICAX_INV_2G

    ISU_INV_2G

    PSCD_COLLECTIONS_MANAGEMENT_4G

                                                                                       Page | 1069
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    TEL_INV_2G

Afterwards, the joint master data replication needs to be activated in the IMG
customizing under Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable -> Integration ->
Convergent Charging -> Activate Joint Replication of All Master Data. For further
activities, please refer to the documentation of this IMG activity.

Using an integrated SAP CRM system, you need to activate the joint master data
replication in SAP CRM by customizing the distribution schema of your order
distribution infrastructure (ODI) accordingly. The step types "Call ERP Message contract
activation MCC (PCMA)" and "Call ERP Message Contract Deactivation MCC
(PCMD)" need to be used (instead of "Call ERP Message contract activation (PCEA)"
and "Call ERP Message contract deactivation (PCED)"). In addition, call the SAP ERP
contract update with the correct settings. You can make the relevant settings and define
distribution schemas in the customizing for Customer Relationship Management under
Cross-Industry Functions -> Provider Order and Contract Management -> Transactions
-> Document Distribution ->Define Settings for Document Distribution. Activate the
joint replication of master data in SAP ERP according to the corresponding
documentation. Maintain the settings that specify how often you can retry locking the
contract for the asynchronous status updates from SAP ERP in the customizing for
Customer Relationship Management under Cross-Industry Functions -> Provider Order
and Contract Management -> Joint Distribution and Multiple SAP CC Systems for a SAP
CRM System -> Settings for Joint Distribution and Multiple SAP CC Systems -> Settings
for Document Distribution.

To check if you use the joint replication of master data, call the transaction SM31 to
check the customizing table DFKK_CC_MD_REL for entries and if the flags CCREL
and CCSEQUENCE are set. If CCREL is set and CCSEQUENCE is empty, you are
not using joint replication and need to take further action. If CCSEQUENCE does not
exist, you have to upgrade to at least SAP Enhancement Package 7 (SP08) for SAP ERP
6.0 and then take further action. If both flags are set or both flags are empty, you do
not need to do anything. Alternatively to transaction SM31, go to the implementation
guide (transaction SPRO) and check the following customizing path: Financial
Accounting -> Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable -> Integration -> Convergent
Charging -> Activate Replication of Business Partners and Accounts to SAP CC.

Migration from Direct to Joint Master Data Distribution

If you want to migrate to S/4HANA you need to use the joint master data distribution as
this is the only replication method which is supported. If you are currently using the
direct master data distribution, you need to migrate your existing distribution data before
you can activate the joint master data distribution. The migration functionality is
available from SAP ERP 6.0 EHP7 SPS14 and SAP ERP 6.0 EHP8 SPS06 onwards.

                                                                                               Page | 1070
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Alternatively, if you are using older support packages, you can install the SAP Notes
2401583 and 2387353.

Once the migration functionality is available in your system, proceed as follows to
migrate from the direct to the joint master data distribution:

1. Suspend the master data distribution in SAP CRM before you start with the migration.
(That means business partner, business agreement/contract account, prepaid account,
provider contract and master agreement creation and changes are not distributed to SAP
ERP.)

2. Call up transaction FKKCC_MIG2JOINT in SAP ERP. It consists of three steps but
you can also execute the steps independently from each other (in this case, consider the
step sequence!):

(1) Clean-up of distribution records

The same functionality is provided by report RFKK_CC_MD_CLEAN_UP. This step is
optional but recommended. By reducing the number of existing distribution records, the
migration report will be executed faster.

(2) Creation of rating area assignment and distribution object data

This step is mandatory. It creates rating area assignment records for business partners,
contract accounts, and prepaid accounts for rating area SPACE and creates the
distribution information for provider contracts. Please note that rating areas with value
SPACE are already technically used for the joint master data replication although the
functionality of rating areas (multiple SAP Convergent Charging instances) might not be
active yet.

(3) Adaptation of distribution records

This step is mandatory. All existing distribution records of business partners, contract
accounts, and prepaid accounts that are not marked as obsolete will be adapted to the
joint master data distribution. In addition, if no rating area assignment exists for those
objects up to this point, it will be created. In this step, errors can be thrown if the object to
be processed is currently locked by another process. In this case, you need to execute this
step again when the object lock is removed so that everything is properly migrated to the
joint master data distribution.

                                                                                               Page | 1071
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Make sure that no errors are shown in the application log of the transaction. Execute the
transaction again until all errors of the affected step are resolved.

3. Activate the joint master data distribution in SAP CRM and SAP ERP.

4. Resume the master data distribution of business partners, business agreements/contract
accounts, prepaid accounts, provider contracts, and master agreements in SAP CRM.

Note:

If erroneously distributed provider contracts still exist in SAP CRM from the direct
master data distribution, you can resolve this by choosing "Cancel Activation ...and
Return to Order Processing" in the ODI distribution monitor. Afterwards, you can submit
the order once again. Then, the distribution will be done by using the joint master data
distribution.

45.Industry Banking

45.1 S4TWL - Business User integration of BPs with user name and personal
      number

Application Components:FS-BP

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2900607
                              Simplification Item S4TWL - Business
                              User integration of Business Partners
                              with user name and personnel number

Symptom

You execute a system conversion to S/4HANA, On-Premise-Edition 1909 or higher. In
S/4HANA the fields "user name" (XUBNAME) and "personnel number"
(PERS_NR) from table BP001 of the Financial Services enhancement of the SAP
Business Partner are not available. The corresponding information needs to be retrieved
from HR. Because of this a business partner, in which one of the two fields is not initial,
needs to get connected to an HR person during the system conversion. This note

                                                                                               Page | 1072
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

describes activities that need to be executed in the source system before conversion in
order to ensure a smooth conversion process and correct assignment between business
partner, HR person and user name.

Reason and Prerequisites

The fields BP001-XUBNAME and BP001-PERS_NR are not available any more in
S/4HANA. Applications that have accessed these fields need to access the corresponding
HR tables now, for example via CDS view I_BUSINESSUSER. This is ensured by the
corresponding applications in separate notes. To make sure that this access is successful
the corresponding bps need to be connected to an HR person or, in case HR is not active
in your system, to the corresponding object in the FIORI app to maintain employees.
This will happen during the system conversion and will only work without error if some
preconditions are fulfilled. These pre-conditions need to be checked before the upgrade
and will be integrated into the simplification item check.

Solution

Procedure for determining the relevance

The check only needs to be executed for a business partner if there is at least one entry in
table BP001 for this business partner that contains a non-initial value in one of the fields
XUBNAME or PERS_NR.

Check details

A check class will be integrated into the Simplification Item Check Report
/SDF/RC_CHECK_START. Technically this class is delivered with note 2907836. This
class checks if all pre-conditions are fulfilled so that the integration of the corresponding
BPs into HR or HR app are met. In case of errors the migration to S/4HANA can be
started only after these errors have been solved.

The following checks are executed centrally in all clients of your system (apart from 000
and 066) and per client for all business partners that were found by the above condition:

I. Generic checks (independent if HR is active or not):

    For each business partner found in BP001 an entry in the header table BUT000 must
         exist.
         [This check is a pre-caution as we had few customers with this kind of
         inconsistency in the past]

    The corresponding business partner needs to be a person (partner category 1).

                                                                                               Page | 1073
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    The corresponding business partner needs to be assigned to a role with role category
         "Employee" (role category BUP003 in table TB003 - can be maintained via view
         V_TB003 in transaction SM30).

    In case there is an entry in table USR21 for the user name from BP001-XUBNAME,
         the following conditions dependent on field USR21-IDADTYPE must be
         fulfilled:
         IDADTYPE 00: The GUID value in USR21-BPPERSON must be initial
         IDADTYPE 01 and 03: This IDADTYPE must not be assigned
         IDADTYPE 02 and 04: The GUID in USR21-BPPERSON must not be initial and
         must be equal to the PARTNER_GUID in table BUT000 for the corresponding
         business partner.

    The user name (BP001-XUBNAME) and personnel number (BP001-PERS_NR) of
         the corresponding business partner must not be assigned to several business
         partners.

II. Additional checks for the case that HR is not active:

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial: A central person for the business partner
         number with assigned user name exists in HR table HRP1001 and the user name
         needs to be identical to BP001-XUBNAME.

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial: A central person for the business partner user
         name exists in HR table HRP1001 and the business partner assigned to this
         central person must be identical to BP001-PARTNER.

III. Additional checks for the case that HR is active:

    If BP001-PERS_NR is not initial: the value in field PERS_NR must be numeric and
         have a maximum length of 8 digits

    The business partner must be assigned to a central person in table HRP1001 via
         business partner number in field SOBID (and values SCLAS = 'BP', RSIGN = 'B',
         RELAT = '207' and the corresponding plan variant - field PLVAR - from table
         T77S0 for the client)

    A central person for the business partner with assigned personnel number must exist
         in table HRP1001 and the personal number needs to be identical to BP001-
         PERS_NR.

    The central person assigned to the bp needs to have an entry in HR table PA0105 and
         the personnel number needs to be identical to BP001-PERS_NR

                                                                                               Page | 1074
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    If BP001-PERS_NR is not initial:
         For this PERS_NR exactly one central person must exist in table HRP1001 which
         is assigned to the same business partner, and
         for this PERS_NR a user name in table PA0105 must exist with the same user
         name as in BP001-XUBNAME

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial:
         An entry for this user name needs to exist in table PA0105 with the same
         PERS_NR and the user name needs to be identical to BP001-XUBNAME, and
         for this user a central person in table HRP1001 needs to exist with the same
         personnel number assigned to the same business partner.

In all cases an error is returned when the condition is not met

Necessary activities in case of errors from the check class

The check class CLS4SIC_FSBP_BP001_HR is provided by SAP and integrated into
report /SDF/RC_START_CHECK. This means that the relevance check can be started
via this report. Further activities are only necessary in case the check class returns at least
one error. These activities are described in the following:

I. Generic checks

    In case no BUT000 entry exists for a BP001-entry: execute
         report FS_BP_DELETE_ORPHANED_DATASETS in the affected client to
         delete orphaned BP001 entries.

    Business partner is not of category "Person" (bp category 1): For such business
         partners you need to delete the two fields from table BP001.

    Role employee is not assigned to the relevant bps: If this check returns an error you
         need to create a role with role category "employee" (BUP003) for this bp in table
         BUT100. In the simple case you can use role BUP003. Mass creation of role
         BUP003 or a custom role can be achieved using transaction MASS for object type
         BUS1006 (Business Partner). Alternatively create a small report in customer
         name space and call BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD_2 in it.

    Inconsistencies in table USR21: You need to correct the concerned entries from table
         USR21 in the following way:
         IDADTYPE 00: delete the GUID value in field USR21-BPPERSON
         IDADTYPE 01 and 03: delete the complete entry from table USR21
         IDADTYPE 02 and 04: enter the entry from BUT000-PARTNER_GUID in field
         USR21-BPPERSON

                                                                                               Page | 1075
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    The same user name or the same personnel number is assigned to several business
         partners: check the assignments and adapt them in a way that every user name and
         personnel number is only assigned once in table BP001.

II. Additional checks in case HR is not active:

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial: Make sure that a central person for the business
         partner number with assigned user name exists in HR table HRP1001 and the user
         name in HRP1001 is identical to BP001-XUBNAME.

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial: Make sure that a central person for the business
         partner user name exists in HR table HRP1001 and the business partner assigned
         to this central person is identical to BP001-PARTNER.

III. Additional checks in case HR is active:

    If BP001-PERS_NR is not initial: make sure that the value in field PERS_NR is
         numeric and has a maximum length of 8 digits or delete the field BP001-
         PERS_NR for this business partner.

    Create a central person for this business partner in table HRP1001 via business
         partner number in field SOBID (and values SCLAS = 'BP', RSIGN = 'B', RELAT
         = '207' and the corresponding plan variant - field PLVAR - from table T77S0 for
         the client)

    Assign the personnel number from BP001-PERS_NR to corresponding field of the
         central person entry in table HRP1001.

    Create an entry in table PA0105 for the central person and make sure that the
         personnel number is identical to BP001-PERS_NR.

    If BP001-PERS_NR is not initial:
         Make sure that for this PERS_NR exactly one central person exists in table
         HRP1001 which is assigned to the same business partner, and
         for this PERS_NR a user name in table PA0105 exists with the same user name as
         in BP001-XUBNAME.

    If BP001-XUBNAME is not initial:
         Make sure that an entry for this user name exists in table PA0105 with the same
         PERS_NR in which the user name is identical to BP001-XUBNAME, and
         for this user a central person in table HRP1001 exists with the same personnel
         number assigned to the same business partner.

Further actions some time after the conversion

                                                                                               Page | 1076
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

After the conversion all entries in the two fields BP001-PERS_NR and BP001-
XUBNAME (including the flags BP001-HR_ORG_FLAG and BP001-STAFF_GRP
need to be deleted.

Before you do this you should wait some time in order to be sure that the user name and
personal number are fetched correctly from HR or the HR app by the applications.

The deletion should be done at the latest, before you start planning the next upgrade to a
higher release level of S/4HANA.

Other Terms

SAP Business for Financial Services, Business Partner, SAP BP, FSBP, BP001, user,
user name, personal number, XUBNAME, PERS_NR, HR Integration

45.2 S4TWL - FSBP Table Additional Partner Numbers (BPID001) obsolete

Application Components:FS-BP

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  3004812
                              S4TWL - FSBP table Additional Partner
                              Numbers (BPID001) is obsolete

Symptom

You execute a system conversion from ERP to S/4HANA or an upgrade from a lower
S/4HANA release to a higher one (2021 or higher).

From S/4HANA 2021 onwards the Financial Services Business Partner table Additional
Partner Numbers (table name BPID001) is obsolete. The data of this table have to be
migrated to table BUT0ID. This note describes activities that have to be executed in order
to perform the migration in the source system before the conversion.

Reason and Prerequisites

Financial Services Business Partner table Additional Partner Numbers (BPID001) must
not be used any more from S/4HANA 2021 onwards. The table is very similar to the
central business partner table Identification Numbers (BUT0ID), therefore the table the
migration into the Identification Numbers table BUT0ID which was optional up to now
will be enforced now.

                              Page | 1077
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Solution

Procedure for determining the relevance

The migration needs to be executed as soon as there is at least one entry in table
BPID001 in any of the clients of your system apart from 000 and 066.

There will also be a consistency check class that is triggered by the SUM process. SUM
process will be stopped if there are data in table BPID001 in one of the clients.

Required and recommended actions

In case there are entries in table BPID001 these need to be migrated to table BUT0ID and
deleted afterwards.

In SAP note 1556353 you can find a detailed description what needs to be done to
execute this migration.

The main steps are the following:

    Creation of a mapping for customizing (BPID001 -> BUT0ID)

    BADI implementation in case of customer-specific enhancement in table BPID001

    Activation of business function CA_FSBP_MIGRATION_ID (creates new
         customizing entries in table BUT0ID)

    Migration of BPID001 data to BUT0ID table (including migration of change
         documents)

The migration is implemented via the ASU toolbox. This means that you will be guided
through the whole process supported by the system after starting ASU toolbox. For
details how to start this guided process please check note 1556353 and the referenced
note 1000009.

Other Terms

SAP Business for Financial Services, Business Partner, SAP BP, FSBP,
BPID001, Additional Partner Numbers, BUT0ID, Identification Numbers

45.3 S4TWL - SEM Banking
Application Components:IS-B-PA, IS-B-DP, IS-B-RA, IS-B-SA

                                                           Page | 1078
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Related Notes:    Note Number  Note Description
                  2270318      S4TWL - SEM Banking
 Note Type
 Business Impact

Symptom
You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA. The following SAP S/4HANA
Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.
Solution
Description
The SEM Banking functionality is not included in SAP S/4HANA.
Larger parts of the SEM Banking functionality have already been replaced by the Bank
Analyzer (part of the Banking platform "Banking Services from SAP") or other
applications, but it's important to note there are still functions, which have no successor.
A technical disablement of SEM Banking was done as follows:

    The SEM Banking menu was disabled (hidden)
    The SEM Banking IMG was disabled (hidden)
    Central SEM Banking transactions will terminate with an "A-message"
It's not allowed to execute SEM Banking transactions anymore.

Business Process related information

The whole SEM Banking application with its parts "Datapool", "Profit Analyzer", "Risk
Analyzer" and "Strategy Analyzer" won't be offered in the context of SAP S/4HANA.

Transaction not available in SAP S/4HANA All SEM Banking related transaction codes for
                                                                "Datapool", "Profit Analyzer", "Risk Analyzer"
                                                                and "Strategy Analyzer".

                                                                                       Page | 1079
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Required and Recommended Action(s)

Users of SEM Banking have to evaluate alternatives to the usage of SEM Banking in
SAP S/4HANA systems (e.g. replacement of SEM Banking functionality by the Bank
Analyzer or keeping SEM Banking on a separate ERP installation).

Moreover the option to archive (delete) obsolete SEM Banking data (after having
switched off SEM Banking and before migrating the system to SAP S/4HANA) should
be considered, in order to avoid that unnecessary data is kept in the SAP S/4HANA
environment. Possible candidates are Banking operating concerns (as part of the SEM
Banking Profit Analyzer) or variable transactions (as part of the SEM Banking Datapool),
but please note that a customer-specific analysis is mandatory, in order to ensure that
only obsolete data is going to be archived (deleted).

How to Determine Relevancy

There is an active risk management area and / or there is an active Banking operating
concern in the system

Related SAP Notes

Custom Code related information     For more details see SAP Note 2211665

Other Terms
SEM Banking

45.4 S4TWL - CML-specific functions with regard to collaterals and
      collateral objects

Application Components:FS-CML

Related Notes:

Note Type          Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact    2369934
                                    S4TWL - CML-specific functions with
                                    regard to collaterals and collateral
                                    objects

Symptom
You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA. The following SAP S/4HANA
Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

                                                                                               Page | 1080
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Reason and Prerequisites

FS-CML Consumer and Mortgage Loans: The CML-specific functions with regard to
collaterals and collateral objects are not available in SAP S/4HANA (including the SAP
Simple Finance editions).

(Remark: See also the entry with the subject "Real Estate Classic" in the "Simplification
List for SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1511".)

Therefore it's not allowed to use CML-specific functions with regard to collaterals and
collateral objects in the context of SAP S/4HANA (including the SAP Simple Finance
editions).

Examples for transactions, which must not be used, are:

    Object Processing (Create, Change and Display) - FNO1, FNO2 and FNO3

    Collateral Value Calculation (Create, Change and Display) - FN61, FN62 and FN63

    Collateral (Create, Change and Display) - FNO5, FNO6 and FNO7

Of course all customizing transactions and settings, which are related to the CML-
specific functions with regard to collaterals and collateral objects, must not be used, too.

Solution

At this point, it is highly recommended to use the functions of application FS-CMS
Collateral Management.

The transition from the CML-specific functions with regard to collaterals and collateral
objects to FS-CMS must take place before the transformation to SAP S/4HANA.

In principle such a transition consists of two steps:

    Implementation (i.e. configuration and customizing etc.) of FS-CMS

    Migration of data from FS-CML to FS-CMS

Other Terms
RE, Classic, RE-FX Real Estate Management, RE Classic, RE-Classic
Land Register, Land Registry

Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Business Partner

CML collaterals and collateral objects

45.6 S4TWL - Deprecation of app F3987

Application Components:FI-GL-GL-ADB

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number           Note Description
Business Impact  3209838
                                       S4TWL - Deprecation of Average Daily
                                       Balance Key figure Report App ( F3987
                                       )

Symptom
You want to use Average Daily Balance Key figure Report app F3987.
Reason and Prerequisites
The Average Daily Balance Key figure Report App will be deprecated in on premise S/4
HANA 2022 and will become obsolete.
We recommend you to switch to the successor app W0166, as soon as possible.
Solution
Description
The Average Daily Balance Key figure Report App will be deprecated in on premise S/4
HANA 2022 and will become obsolete.
We recommend you to switch to the successor app W0166, as soon as possible.

                                       Page | 1083
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Business process related information

The Average Daily Balance (ADB) is a figure that represents the average balance of an
account for a specific period. The app F3987 allows you to calculate ADBs for intra-
month dates based on the posting date of FI documents.You can also calculate sevaral
other key figures, such as the year-to-date average balance. This app therefore allows you
to calculate efficiently and accurately the ADB at any point during a year.

With the new app W0166, you can display average daily balances and spot balances. You
can do this for each ledger and all company codes. Using this app, you can add the
measures and dimensions by using drag and drop functions to provide a user-friendly
interface. Also, this allows you to display data in a hierarchical format.

Required and Recommended Actions

Anyone using F3987 app should switch to the successor app W0166.

How to Determine Relevancy

If you are using F3987 app, this deprecation note is applicable for you.

Other Terms

F3987, ADB, ADB Key figure report, ADBKFC

46.Industry Beverage

46.1 S4TWL - IS-Beverage (Excise Duty)

Application Components:SD-SLS-PLL

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number            Note Description
Business Impact  2531942
                                        IS-Beverage functionality depricated:
                                        Excise Duty is unavailable in S4HANA

Symptom

The IS-Beverage functionality Excise Duty is unavailable in S4HANA. In 2004 the IS-
Beverage solution has been moved to ERP. Some of the functionalities were never
available for ERP customers. The functionalitis which were never available in ERP as
well as some of the later functionalities are deprecated in S4HANA.

Reason and Prerequisites

With the transition from ERP to S/4HANA old Beverage functionalities like Excise Duty
will be unavailable.

Solution

For detailed information on how to identify which of your custom code objects might
need to be adapted in order to be compatible with SAP S/4HANA, please refer to

    SAP note 2190420

    https://blogs.sap.com/2017/02/15/sap-s4hana-system-conversion-custom-code-
         adaptation-process/

46.2 S4TWL - IS-Beverage (Sales Returns)

Application Components:MM-IM-ED, SD-SLS-PLL, SD-BF-EC, SD-BF-AC, SD-SLS-RE-SR

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number              Note Description
Business Impact  2531884
                                          IS-Beverage functionality Sales Returns
                                          is unavailable in S4HANA (equivalent
                                          exists)

Symptom

In 2004 the IS-Beverage solution has been moved to ERP. Some of the functionalities
were never available for ERP customers. The functionalitis which were never available in
ERP as well as some of the later functionalities are deprecated in S4HANA. The IS-
Beverage functionality Sales Returns is unavailable in S4HANA.

For the deprecated IS-Beverage functionality Sales Returns there is the successor
Advanced Return Management available.

Reason and Prerequisites

With the transition from ERP to S/4HANA old Beverage functionalities will be
unavailable.

Solution
For detailed information on how to identify which of your custom code objects might
need to be adapted in order to be compatible with SAP S/4HANA, please refer to

    SAP note 2190420
    https://blogs.sap.com/2017/02/15/sap-s4hana-system-conversion-custom-code-

         adaptation-process/

                               Security (DFPS)

Defense Forces & Public Security (DFPS) is part of the SAP S/4HANA compatibility
scope, which comes with limited usage rights. For more details on the compatibility
scope and its expiry date and links to further information please refer to SAP note
2269324. In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note 2269324, Defense Forces &

                                                                                               Page | 1094
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Public Security (DFPS) can be found under the ID 123 (7017755, SAP Force

its designated alternative functionality Defense & Security (D&S) before expiry of the
compatibility pack license.

S/4HANA Feature Scope Description in section SAP S/4HANA Compatibility Packs >
Industries > Public Services > Defense and Security.

A description of the functionality of the alternative solution (D&S) you find in the same
document in section SAP S/4HANA LoB Products for specific industries > Public
Service > Defense and Security.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

As DFPS can be used until the expiry date of the compatibility pack license, it is up to
each customer to decide, when (with which of the coming SAP S/4HANA releases) they
want to migrate to the designated alternative functionality. Nevertheless, the decision at
which point in time this will be done, should be taken early in advance in order to plan
accordingly for the migration efforts.
