54.8 S4TWL - FS-RI - Ensuring the functionality of the Extension Service

Application Components:FS-RI-LRM, FS-RI-ES, XX-PART-MSG-LRM

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2972152
                              S4TWL - FS-RI - Ensuring the
                              functionality of the Extension Service

Symptom
You are performing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA. In this case, the following
entry in the worklist for the transition to SAP S/4HANA applies.
Reason and Prerequisites
This SAP Note is relevant to you if your source release for the system conversion fulfills
one of the following conditions:

    ERP system
    SAP S/4HANA 1709 (FP 02) to SAP S/4HANA 2020 (Initial Shipment Stack)
Solution
Description
Extension Service objects are no longer available in SAP Reinsurance Management for
SAP S/4HANA and in SAP S/4HANA Insurance for reinsurance management.
Information related to the business process
The impact on business processes depends on the use of the obsolete objects.
Required actions

                                                                                               Page | 1226
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Check whether you used the obsolete objects. If you did, you must perform the following
steps:

During the SPAU and SPDD adjustment, the system may issue warnings stating that an
adjustment is required for modified objects. This affects Extension Service structures
with the name /MSG/BAPI_ED_* or /MSG/BAPI_EC_*. You can ignore these warnings.
You can also reset the modifications. However, this may result in errors and should
therefore be avoided.
When the Extension Service is regenerated after the upgrade, these BAPI structures are
also regenerated. As a result, the Extension Service is consistent and functioning again.

Create customer variant

    Call transaction /MSG/7FW_START.

    Double-click "Workplace" and open the application "10000".

    Right-click "10000" and choose "Customer Variant".

    Populate the following fields:

             Customer Variant

             License Key

             Storage Package of Classes

             Class Prefix

    Choose "New".

    Save the change and choose a suitable request to do so.

Choose "Generate".

Call transaction /MSG/7FW_START again and, before choosing "Generate",
ensure that all requests that contain the relevant objects have been released.

    Call transaction /MSG/2_ES_EXT_SRVC.

    Under "Applications", select FS-RI-RML-SRA-PM.

    Under "Extendable Tables", select the table /MSG/VDOCLAIM.

                                                                                               Page | 1227
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    Under "Enhancements", select /MSG/ED_OCLM01 and choose "Activate" (Ctrl+F3).
    In the dialog box that is displayed, create a request and save it.
    Confirm any other dialog boxes that may be displayed. If the system displays a dialog

         box for the IDocs, choose "No".
    If no errors occur, navigate back to transaction /MSG/2_ES_EXT_SRVC and repeat

         the steps 3 to 6 for the following tables:
             /MSG/VDOCOND
             /MSG/VDOCONDBASE
             /MSG/VDOINSPER
             /MSG/VDOLOAD
             /MSG/VDOPCSHR
             /MSG/VDOPOL
             /MSG/VDOPOLCOMP

    Navigate back to transaction /MSG/2_ES_EXT_SRVC and select FS-RI-RML-SRA
         under "Applications".

    Repeat the steps 3 to 6 for the following tables:
             /MSG/VDOUWASS
             /MSG/VDOUWPOLDAT

Note that two enhancements must be generated for /MSG/VDOUWASS.
If errors occur during generation, call the transaction again and generate the enhancement
again.
The system may issue the following error messages:

    "Unable to load business object element ENTITY"
    "Unable to load business object element PERSISTENCE"
    "Unable to load business object element CHMODEL"

                                                                                               Page | 1228
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    "Unable to load business object element CTRLMODEL"
Del-tool for problems with COND

    Add the following entry to the table /MSG/0CHECK:
             KORVAS-SAP

    Call transaction /MSG/2_ES_DEL_TOOL.

    Select the entry RCOND01.
    Choose "Generate Standard".
Other Terms
Extension Service

54.9 S4TWL - FS-RI deletion of obsolete functionality for FI-AR

Application Components:FS-RI

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2964772
                              S4TWL - FS-RI deletion of obsolete
                              functionality for FI-AR

Symptom
You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA. The following SAP S/4HANA
Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.
Reason and Prerequisites
This SAP Note is relevant for you when your start release for the system conversion is an
ERP release.
It is not relevant if your start release is S/4HANA Finance or S/4HANA.
Solution
Description

                                                                                               Page | 1229
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

In SAP Reinsurance Management for SAP S/4HANA and in SAP S/4HANA Insurance
for reinsurance management, obsolete FS-RI functionality objects for FI-AR are deleted.

Business Process related information

Following business processes are no longer available:

    Goto Accounts Receivable (Transaction /MSG/RFDMN)

    Transfer Posting (Transaction /MSG/R_AU)

    Cash Loss/Noted Item (Transaction /MSG/R_AS and /MSG/R_AS1)

    Broker View of Line Items (Transaction /MSG/R_KM)

For Goto Accounts Receivable use Transaction RFDMN instead of /MSG/RFDMN.
For Transfer Posting use Transaction /MSG/R_AU1 instead of /MSG/R_AU.

Effects on customer business processes depends on the usage of obsolete objects in
custom code.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

Check if the obsolete objects in the piece list are used in custom code. If yes, you must
adapt the custom code.

54.12S4TWL - FS-RI Ł Deprecation of RAM APIs with SAP S/4HANA 2021

Application Components:XX-PART-MSG-RAM, FS-RI-RAM

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  3104363
                              S4TWL - FS-RI - Announcement of
                              deletion of obsolete RAM APIs

Symptom

You want to perform a system conversion from EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - 06 (10/2014) or
higher, or a release upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 1709, SAP S/4HANA 1809, SAP S/4HANA
1909, SAP S/4HANA 2020, or SAP S/4HANA 2021 to SAP S/4HANA 2021 or higher.

Reason and Prerequisites

                                                   Page | 1235
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

This SAP Note is relevant if your current release is EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - 06 (10/2014)
or higher, SAP S/4HANA 1709, SAP S/4HANA 1809, SAP S/4HANA 1909, SAP S/4HANA
2020, or SAP S/4HANA 2021.

Solution

Description
The following function modules are deprecated with Release SAP S/4HANA 2021 and will be
deleted completely as of Release SAP S/4HANA 2022.

    /MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK
    /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS
    /MRA/A2X_IR_F_ENDPER_BY_EL
    /MRA/A2X_IR_M_REGISTER_RISK
    /MRA/A2X_IR_P_SHIFT_RISK
    /MRA/A2X_RR_F_BY_ELEMENTS
    /MRA/A2X_RR_M_CESSION
    /MRA/A2X_RR_M_PRECESSION
    /MRA/A2X_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS
The following structures for function modules are deprecated with SAP S/4HANA
Release 2021 and will be deleted completely as of SAP S/4HANA Release 2022.

     /MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK_IN
     /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACC_IN
     /MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_IN
     /MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_OUT
     /MRA/A2A_IR_M_REG_RISK_IN
     /MRA/A2A_IR_P_SHIFT_RISK_IN
     /MRA/A2A_RR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_OUT

                                                                                               Page | 1236
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

     /MRA/A2A_RR_M_CESSION_IN

     /MRA/A2A_RR_M_CESSION_OUT

     /MRA/A2A_RR_M_PRECESSION_IN

     /MRA/A2A_RR_M_PRECESSION_OUT

     /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNT_IN

Information related to the business process

If your target release is SAP S/4HANA 2021, using the obsolete function modules has no
effect for the time being. However, we recommend that you start using the replacing function
modules as soon as possible.

If your target release is SAP S/4HANA 2022, it is no longer technically possible to use the
deleted function modules. They must be replaced by the new function modules.

Required Action(s)

Check whether you are using one of the obsolete or deleted function modules and replace it
with the new function module as soon as possible, as described above:

    /MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK is replaced by
         /MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK_V2

    /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS is replaced by
         /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS_V2

    /MRA/A2X_IR_F_ENDPER_BY_EL is replaced by
         /MRA/A2X_IR_F_ENDPER_BY_EL_V2

    /MRA/A2X_IR_M_REGISTER_RISK is replaced by
         /MRA/A2X_IR_M_REGISTER_RISK_V2

    /MRA/A2X_IR_P_SHIFT_RISK is replaced by
         /MRA/A2X_IR_P_SHIFT_RISK_V2

    /MRA/A2X_RR_F_BY_ELEMENTS is replaced
         by /MRA/A2X_RR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_V2

    /MRA/A2X_RR_M_CESSION is replaced by /MRA/A2X_RR_M_CESSION_V2

    /MRA/A2X_RR_M_PRECESSION is replaced
         by /MRA/A2X_RR_M_PRECESSION_V2

                                                                                               Page | 1237
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

/MRA/A2X_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS is replaced by
    /MRA/A2X_RTA_C_PRE_ACCOUNTS_V2

Check whether you use one of the obsolete or deleted structures for function modules and
replace it with the new function module as soon as possible, as described above:

/MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK_IN is replaced
    by /MRA/A2A_IR_MODIFY_RISK_V2_IN

/MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACC_IN is replaced by
    /MRA/A2A_RTA_C_PRE_ACCNT_V2_IN

/MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_IN is replaced
    by /MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEM_V2_IN

/MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEMENTS_OUT is replaced
    by /MRA/A2A_IR_F_BY_ELEM_V2_OUT

Description

available:

          CHECK_CLAIMHD_ALLOC_CLAIM: No replacement

              method COPY_OCLAIM_ASS of the class
              /MSG/CL_VRP_LIB_BO_CLAIMASS.

In release SAP S/4HANA 2022, the following methods are renamed:

Class /MSG/CL_VRP_LIB_BO_CLAIM_DATA:

          SET_OCLAIMHD_FROM_MCLAIMHD is renamed to
              ASSIGN_MCLAIMHD_TO_OCLAIMHD

          CHK_FIELD_CHANGE is renamed to RESET_CLAIM_HEADER_FIELDS

Class /MSG/CL_VRP_LIB_BO_CLAIM_ASS:

          CREAT_OCLAIM_ASS is renamed to CREATE_OCLAIM_ASS

54.21S4TWL - FS-RI Ł Replacement of outdated PUMA reminders
Application Components:FS-RI-PUM

Related Notes:

                                                                                               Page | 1260
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  3472166
                              S4TWL - FS-RI Ł Replacement of
                              obsolete PUMA reminders

Symptom

You are upgrading from a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and you are using
Professional Underwriting Management Application (PUMA).

Reason and Prerequisites

This SAP Note is relevant for you if your source release for the upgrade is an SAP
S/4HANA release in the area of SAP S/4HANA 1709 FPS00 up to and including SAP
S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 and you use reminders in PUMA.

It is not relevant if your source release is SAP S/4HANA Finance, SAP S/4HANA 2025
(or higher), or an ERP release.

Solution

Description

As of Release SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, there is a new function for the reminders for
PUMA policies. This can be used in parallel to the usual reminders, which are renamed
"My Personal Reminders". As of release S/4HANA 2025 FPS00, these personal
reminders will be removed from the system and can no longer be used.
If you use PUMA reminders and data exists in the table /UPE/RP_REMIND before the
upgrade, you can migrate the reminders after the upgrade.

Information related to the business process

If your target release is in the area of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (inclusive) up to SAP
S/4HANA 2025 FPS00 (exclusive), the further use of the deprecated functions has no
effect for the time being. However, we recommend that you stop using the function to be
replaced as soon as possible.

If your target release is SAP S/4HANA 2025 or higher, it is no longer technically
possible to use the deleted functions.

Required and recommended action(s)

You can find out which objects are obsolete as of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 and will
be permanently removed from the system as of S/4HANA 2025 FPS00 from the bill of
material in the simplification item (SI22: Insurance_FS-RI).

                                                                                               Page | 1261
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Other Terms
Upgrade
Deprecation

54.24S4TWL - Insurance localization for Russia - deprecation

Application Components:FS-CM-LC

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number     Note Description
Business Impact  2978033
                                 S4TWL - RU insurance localization -
                                 deprecation of package /GSINS/RU

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA or an upgrade from
a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and are using the functionality described in
this Note. The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

Insurance Localization FS-CM for Russia installed.

Solution

Description

Package /GSINS/RU and it contents becomes obsolete because of no customer usage.
Objects stored in the package and corresponding subpackages are removed including
their references from other objects.

Business Process related information

                                                                                       Page | 1265
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Insurance localization for Russia stored in the package /GSINS/RU and it's subpackages
is not being used and has been deprecated in S/4HANA OP2021 and became obsolete in
all the supported lower versions.
Regarding S/4HANA OP2021 release, for transition period of 2 years the package and it's
subpackages has been moved to SW component 'S4DEPREC' if the restoration of the
functionality is needed.

package /GSINS/RU and it's subpackages were removed:

54.25S4TWL - Insurance localization for Turkey

Application Components:FS-CM-LC

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number     Note Description
Business Impact  3164537
                                 S4TWL - TR insurance localization -
                                 deprecation of package /GSINS/TR

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA or an upgrade from
a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and are using the functionality described in
this Note.

The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item SI8: GSFIN_Insurance_TR is
applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

Prerequisite: Insurance Localization FS-CM for Turkey installed.

Reason for deprecation:

    TRAMER functionality could be used to export automotive insurance related
         information in a specific format as XML in order to submit it to authorities in
         Turkey.

    the functionality is not usable anymore without customer modification, as the export
         format defined by the Turkish government has changed since initial delivery of
         the functionality, but it was never adapted to the new format.

                                                                                               Page | 1270
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    hence today customers already use other means to export this data from the system in
         the required format (eg. export to external text file and perform mapping to a
         suitable XML format with XSLT or via 3rd party, own code...).

Solution

Description

Package /GSINS/TR and it contents becomes obsolete because of no customer usage.
Objects stored in the package and corresponding subpackages are removed including
their references from other objects.

TRAMER functionality has already been put on the blocklist and hence will not be usable
anymore without intervention in S/4HANA OP2022 release.

Business Process related information

Insurance localization for Turkey stored in the package /GSINS/TR and it's subpackages
is not being used and has been deprecated in S/4HANA OP2022 and became obsolete in
all the supported lower versions.
Regarding S/4HANA OP2022 release, for transition period of 2 years the package and it's
subpackages has been moved to SW component 'S4DEPREC' if the restoration of the
functionality is needed.

Note content:

package /GSINS/TR and it's subpackages were removed:

55.Industry Media

55.1 S4TWL - SAP Media availability in SAP S/4HANA

Application Components:IS-M

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2506999
                              S4TWL - Industry Solution SAP Media
                              and SAP S/4HANA

Symptom

You are planning a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on Premise Edition. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

The industry solution SAP Media is not available in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition.

None of the media-specific SAP-GUI transactions is released and must not be used in
SAP S/4HANA.

Solution

                                                    Page | 1275
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Customers using the Media Product Master in ERP and no additional functions of the
industry solution SAP Media can use comparable functions in SAP S/4HANA core. The
respective functions are available with SAP S/4HANA, on Premise Edition 1709. See
SAP Note 2499057.

How to determine relevancy

Your start release for the system conversion is an ERP release and has at least one
business function of the industry business function set Media active.

Customers using additional media-specific functions have the following options:

- run SAP Media on a SAP Business Suite on HANA release (if you want to use SAP
HANA as a database for the SAP Business Suite and / or you want to benefit from the
improved functionality of SAP S/4HANA FINANCE Add-on).

- run SAP S/4HANA without SAP Media as separate installation.

Other Terms

SAP Media, Media Product Master

55.2 S4TWL - Media Product Master

Application Components:CA-MDG

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number       Note Description

                                   S4TWL - Media Product Master and
                                   SAP S/4HANA

Symptom
You are planning a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on Premise Edition. The

Solution

                                   Page | 1276
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Customers using the Media Product Master in ERP and no additional functions of the
industry solution SAP Media can use comparable functions in SAP S/4HANA core. The
respective functions are available with SAP S/4HANA, on Premise Edition 1709.

Business Process related information

    Maintain logical hierarchies of media products, such as multiple editions under a
         parent title or multiple episodes under a parent series. The number of hierarchy
         levels can be defined as needed.

    Media-specific and custom fields which were stored in an industry-specific append of
         table MARA in ERP can be defined using the field extensibility tool of SAP
         FIORI.

    The standard FIORI apps of the Product Master can be used to maintain the Media
         Product Masters themselves and relationships between Media Product Masters.

    The industry-specific SAP GUI transactions are no longer available.

    The assignment of business partners to Media Product Masters is not supported in
         SAP S/4HANA.

Required and recommended actions

attached to SAP Note 2499057.

How to determine relevancy

The business function TITLE LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT of the industry business
function set Media is active and you have created media product master records.

56.1 S4TWL- ACM - Simplification for Contract Approval

Application Components:LO-AGR

Related Notes:

                                                        Page | 1277
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2468737
                              Business Impact Note for S4TWL -
                              Changes in ACM (Agricultural Contract
                              Management) Functionality

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion of ACM (Agricultural Contract Management)
from SAP ERP EHP6 or higher to SAP S/4 HANA on-Premise edition. The
following SAP S/4HANA business impact note is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

For ACM, Contract Approval and certain other functionality in other modules like
Orchestration Framework, Application Menu and settlement won't work seamlessly
when accessed from SAP GUI or SAP Fiori launchpad. External interfaces to
third party trading systems are obsolete and are no longer available in S/4HANA.
The ECC prepayment functionality for ACM has been obsoleted as well and
replaced with a new solution CA-PPA in S/4HANA 2020 FPS01 (not supported in
lower releases than 2020 FPS01). For more information about the new CA-PPA
solution, please refer to the S/4HANA product
help: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-
PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/4c0e6ed8bb48429e83eded4
7d6e3f7f7.html?version=2020.001

Solution

In SAP S/4HANA for ACM some applications are not available anymore or changed.

1. Contract approval tab deprecated-

The contract "Approval" tab in the trading contract has now been removed.

The status of contracts is now being managed from GTM Status Management as below:

    Select Status from available `Application Status' under Status Tab

    Click on `Set Status' button to apply the selected status

2. Configuration for GTM contract status-

The complete GTM contract status management has to be set up as below:

                                                                                       Page | 1278
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics Ł General -> Global Trade
Management -> Trading Contract -> Define Application Status and Status Groups

 a. Create new entries for Status Group.

Status Group             Description
N                        ACM Contract Status Group

 b. Define Status for Status Group Ł Select a status from the "Status Groups" list and
maintain the application status.

App. Status Status Name             Workflow Event Event Trigger Default Status Type
                                                            On Saving No Default Status
O  Ready for Archiving                                      On Saving No Default Status
                                                            On Saving No Default Status
T  Approved

U  Draft

 c. Assign Status group to Contract Type

   SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics Ł General -> Global Trade
Management -> Trading Contract -> Define Trading Contract Types

   Double click on contract type and assign status group maintained above.

3. Configuration for mapping contract status to call-off and position relevance- SAP
Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics Ł General -> Global Trade Management
-> Agricultural Contract Management -> Basic Settings -> Maintain Contract Status
Categories

App Status Status Category  Position Relevant Snap. Relevant App. Status Name

T  Call-Off/Application Relevant X                  Approved

4. During system conversion, contracts status management relevant changes, for the
contracts which were created in ECC, will be handled automatically when the ACM
XPRA: /ACCGO/XPRA_CAKHDR is executed.

Contracts with the approval indicator set would be converted as follows:

The field `BTBSTA' of WBHK would be changed to `T'.

Required and Recommended Action(s): Adjust customer specific coding accordingly.

Run the steps mentioned in SAP notes 2481713.

                                                                                       Page | 1279
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

If you are converting from ACM ECC (with IS-OIL OFF) to ACM on S/4 HANA OP
1709 FP00 (software component, IS-OIL) please run the steps mentioned in note
2481873.

Other Terms

IS-OIL, ACM, Agricultural Contract Management, upgrade, S/4HANA OnPrem, system

56.4 S4TWL - ACM: Simplification of Application Document Batch Split
      Process

Application Components:LO-AGR

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number   Note Description

                                                                                       Page | 1281
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Business Impact  3017200  S4TWL - ACM: Simplification of
                          Application Document Batch Split
                          Process

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion of ACM (Agricultural Contract Management) from
SAP ECC(ACCGO 400) to SAP S/4HANA on-premise edition 2020 FPS01 or a higher
release.

Reason and Prerequisites

Application document process changed with respect to batch managed material

Going forward from the S4HANA release 2020 FPS01 the Application document will not
be split on the basis of the batches mentioned on the Load Data Capture(LDC) if Feature
switch (MERGE_APP)( Logistics - General under Global Trade Management ->
Agricultural Contract Management -> Basic Settings -> Activate Feature Switches.)
is checked.

Solution

Recommended action:Its recommended to check all the active application documents
which have been split due to more than one batch on the LDC and complete those
transactions before performing the converison to S4HANA 2020 FPS01 or higher release.

If already converted to Higher release Activate the feature switch Feature switch
(MERGE_APP)( Logistics - General under Global Trade Management -
> Agricultural Contract Management -> Basic Settings -> Activate Feature
Switches.) then use the transaction code /ACCGO/ACM_BSPL_CORR to correct the
Application document by performing the Correction of the Same LDC Document and
form the New sets of the logistics document.

Other Terms

IS-OIL, ACM, Agricultural Contract Management, upgrade, S/4HANA OnPrem 2020
FPS01, system conversion

                              S4TWL - ACM Temporary Lots for Draft
                              Contracts

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

A system upgrade/conversion is about to be done and the source system is one of the
following releases: -

    ACM 4.0

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1709 - All releases

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1809 - FPS00

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1809 - FPS01

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1809 - FPS02

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1909 - FPS00

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1909 - FPS01

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 1909 - FPS02

     ACM on SAP S/4HANA 2020 - FPS00

The target system is 'ACM on SAP S/4HANA 2020 FPS01' or a higher release.

Post-conversion/upgrade, dumps occurs because of the existence of multiple active BAdI
implementations of the BAdI definition
BADI_CPE_FE_RED_DATE_ROUTINE for the same filter value '9999999'. This prevents execution
of various ACM transactions
and prevents successful execution of the SDM /ACCGO/CL_SDM_ACM_V_SDMNPEL.

Important Note: -

    The manual instruction in this note must only be implemented after all the productive
         activities in the system have been
         halted in preparation for the conversion/upgrade. The changes need to be
         performed before any workbench locks are made as part of the upgrade activities.

                                                                                       Page | 1283
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    The transport-request in which the implementation of this note is captured must be
         released to all follow-on systems to
         prevent occurence of this issue in those systems.

Reason and Prerequisites

This step is needed to prevent the occurrence of dumps because of the existence of
multiple BAdI implementations of the BAdI definition
BADI_CPE_FE_REF_DATE_ROUTINE for the same filter value '9999999'.

Solution

Required and Recommended Action(s)

    Run the steps mentioned in SAP Note - 3094714- S4TC ACM Pre-Checks for Data
         Migration of /ACCGO/T_NPELOTS table in the source system

    The manual instruction in this note must only be implemented after all the productive
         activities in the system have been
         halted in preparation for the conversion/upgrade.

    The transport-request in which the implementation of this note is captured must be
         released to all follow-on systems to
         prevent occurence of this issue in those systems.

    Please implement the manual correction instructions attached to this note.

Other Terms

Pre-upgrade/conversion step for upgrade/conversion to ACM on S/4HANA 2021 FPS01
or higher releases

56.6 S4TWL - BF /ACCGO/BF_FP01 is removed from S/4 HANA 2025 SP 00
      rel

Application Components:LO-AGR

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number   Note Description
Business Impact  3519685
                               S4TWL - Business Function
                               /ACCGO/BF_FP01 is removed from S/4
                               HANA 2025 SP 00 release

                               Page | 1284
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Symptom

Customer has planned a system upgrade to S/4 HANA 2025 FPS 00 or any later release
and Business Function /ACCGO/BF_FP01 is switched on in current release (any release
before S/4 HANA 2025 FPS 00).

Reason and Prerequisites

Business Value & Description

Business Function /ACCGO/BF_FP01 is no longer needed and would be deleted in
release S/4 HANA 2025 FPS 00 and all future releases.

Solution

Business Process related information

Business Function /ACCGO/BF_FP01 contains switches for Prepayment processes and
integration of Agricultural Contract Management with Prepayment processes.

Required and Recommended Actions

If in the current release the business function is switched on with an upgrade planned to
S/4 HANA 2025 SP 00 or higher, please take care of the below mentioned actions before
upgrade. If correct actions not taken, it would lead to data loss.

Based on the product requirement

    If the Customer wishes to use ACM and Prepayments it should be ensured that the
         Business Funtions /ACCGO/BF_ECC & BUSINESS_FN_PPMG should be
         active and switched on.

    If the Customer wishes to use ACM only it should be ensured that the Business
         Funtions /ACCGO/BF_ECC should be active and switched on.

    If the Customer wishes to use Prepayments only it should be ensured that the
         Business Funtions BUSINESS_FN_PPMG should be active and switched on.

    If the Customer wishes not to use either of the products ACM & Prepayments there is
         no need to activate and switch on any specific Business Functions.

How to Determine Relevancy

The conditions that identify relevancy are mentioned below.

                                                                                               Page | 1285
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    A system upgrade is planned to S/4 HANA 2025 SP 00 or higher.

    In the current release the business function /ACCGO/BF_FP01 is switched on.

Other Terms

Agricultural Contract Management; ACM; Business Functions; S/4 HANA 2025; S/4
HANA 2025 SP 00; /ACCGO/BF_FP01

not be available, but are still supported for compatibility reasons.

S/4HANA, SFIN and IS-OIL & GAS

56.8 S4TWL - Optimization in Oil & Gas - TD module for STO and sales
      order with POD b

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  2328639
                                  S4TWL - Optimization in Oil Gas - TD
                                  module for STO and sales order with
                                  POD business scenario

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1610.

This is an IS-OIL note for the SAP S/4HANA on premise 1610 release. If you do not
have IS-OIL, this note doesn't apply to you. This note is specific to TD -Sales Orders
with PoD Check & Intra Company STOs

The following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

While performing Load Confirmation (TD process- O4G1) for Sales Order (with PoD) &
STO process, the system would throw an error saying `there is no stock in Intransit
storage location XXXX for the given material'. This is because of the new SAP
S/4HANA MM-IM optimization and performance re-design during execution of MIGO.

When we perform load confirmation for example, in STO the movements which will post
are 311 which will put the stock to in transit (Vehicle) and then this will be issued with a
647(GI) movement followed by 101 movement all in single material document.

But now in SAP S/4HANA re-design data model, we have separate stock checks for 311
movement, 647& 101 respectively, resulting in stock deficit as it is not considering the
fact that the same posting is also bringing in stock.

Solution

                                                                                       Page | 1288
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

This issue is handled by splitting into two material documents Ł one material document
for 311 movement (stock into in transit) and another material document for 641/647 (in
case of STO) followed by 101 movement for the same outbound delivery at the time of
load confirmation

Software Components

IS-OIL

Languages
English
How to Determine Relevancy
This item is relevant for all IS-Oil customer

56.9 S4TWL - Data Model in Oil & Gas Inventory management

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number                   Note Description
Business Impact  2328419
                                               S4TWL-Data Model in Oil & Gas
                                               Inventory management

Symptom

You are an Oil and Gas customer and doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA on-
premise edition 1610. The following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is
applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

                                                           Page | 1289
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

The SAP ERP 6.0 stock inventory management data model consists of the two document
tables MKPF for document header information and MSEG for document item data. In
addition Oil & Gas has MSEGO1 for quantity conversion parameters for material
documents and MSEGO2 Material Document Quantities in Additional Units of Measure.
Additionally there were aggregated actual stock quantity data stored in several tables.
Some of these tables do also store material master data attributes like the tables
MARCO1, MARDO1, MCHBO1, MKOLO1, MSLBO1, MSKAO1, MSKUO1 &
MSPRO1. Such tables with material master data attributes as well as actual stock
quantities will be named as hybrid tables in the following. There were also tables like
MARCHO1, MARDHO1, MCHABO1, MKOLHO1, MSLBHO1, MSKAHO1,
MSKUHO1 & MSPRHO1 which holds periodical history data.

With SAP S/4HANA 1610, this data model has changed significantly. The new de-
normalized table MATDOC is introduced which contains the former header and item data
of a material document as well as a lot of further attributes. Material document data will
be stored in MATDOC only and not anymore in MKPF and MSEG. Oil appends from
MKPF & MSEG are added to MATDOC as an append. To be in line with core data
model MATDOCOIL table has been introduced which contains former MSEGO1 &
MSEGO2 table data and some attributes from core MATDOC table. Additionally the
aggregated actual stock quantities will not be available anymore in the hybrid or replaced
aggregation tables. Instead, actual stock quantity data will be calculated on-the-fly from
the new material document table MATDOCOIL for which some of those additional
special fields are used.

The affected tables are listed below:

                                                               content of the read the

          Measure

Business Process related information

MATDOCOIL Table

MATDOCOIL table has the following structure.

Some technical key fields, optimized for memory consumption

Stock identifier fields from MATDOC table

All fields from the existing oil document table MSEGO1

All fields from the existing oil document table MSEGO2 in column format with
    provision of 60 UoMs

                                                                                       Page | 1293
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Material Stock condensate table MATDOCOILEXTRACT

MATDOCOILEXTRACT is the condensed table of MATDOCOIL which contains
technical key fields to optimize memory consumption, stock identifier fields, period
fields and additional quantity fields.

Records will be inserted in this condensate table MATDOCOILEXTRACT at the same
time as records are inserted in the material document table MATDOCOIL.

The Pre-compacting functionality

    Running at the period end closing

    Can be scheduled as periodic job

    Creates a condensate from all records having the same values in its stock identifying
         fields

    Inserts this condensate as new record and deletes all records contributing to this
         condensate. Hence the actual stock needs to be calculated only from this
         condensate and all document records created since the last Pre-Compacting run.
         Thus, the overall number of records in the condensate table is much less than in
         the material document table as well as the number of records to be aggregated on-
         the-fly is less resulting in high performance.

UoM Index Table

As per the new SAP S/4HANA data model, table MATDOCOIL contains MSEGO2 data.
This table stores multiple UoMs in columnar format as UoM1 | UoM2 | ........ UoM60
(provision is made to store up to 60 UOMs). Earlier in MSEGO2, UoMs were stored in
row format.

In SAP S/4HANA, columnar storage is supported due to performance improvements.
Therefore if each UoM is provided with index number and stored in respective columns,
aggregation will be faster in HANA DB. Thus MATDOCOIL_INDEX table would be
used to determine the position of the UoMs and their quantities during the data insert to
MATDOCOIL table.

MATDOCOIL_INDEX table get updated as follows

    Initial Load: This is based on MSEGO2 & MARCO1, the UoMs would be updated to
         the Oil index table MATDOCOIL_INDEX during migration.

                                                                                               Page | 1294
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    Delta Load: When the posting is done, the UoM is checked for existence in the
         MATDOCOIL_INDEX table. If not present, then that UoM is added by assigning
         next index number.

Flexible framework for UoM extension after 60 UoM

According to SAP S4 HANA redesign in HPM, the system supports up to 60 unique
UoMs. Once the UoM count exceeds 60, the user will not be able to post material
documents with new UoM. To overcome this problem a flexible framework is provided
to customers.

As per the framework when the UoM count reached to warning limit (total UoM fileds Ł
5 UoM fields i.e. 60-5 = 55), an information message will be popped up in MIGO process
stating UoM count has reached XX number, to retain smooth operation implement SAP
note 2293641.

Data Archiving in S/4HANA for HPM (MATDOCOIL)

With SAP S/4HANA the database design for material documents was changed from the
old tables MKPF and MSEG to the new table MATDOC and in IS-OIL from MSEGO1
and MSEGO2 to MATDOCOIL. For the tables MKPF, MSEG, MSEGO1 and MSEGO2
an archiving function is in place through the archiving object MM_MATBEL. The
existing implementation of the archiving object MM_MATBEL shall be changed in a
way that it works with the new table while existing settings for this archiving object are
still valid and data which has already been archived in the customer environment is still
accessible.

When material documents are moved from the DB into archive files it must be ensured
that the calculation of the current stock level, as well as of historical stock levels is still
working accurately. As the stock level is calculated on the basis of all stock movements
for a particular stock identifier, this means that the archiving of material documents goes
together with the creation of representatives for the archived entities.
It must be ensured that the aging and deletion of archived material documents does not
happen in parallel. For this purpose a new lock object EMATDOC_AGING with client
(MANDT) as lock parameter is introduced. When starting data aging for aging object
MM_MATDOC in the aging runtime an exclusive lock shall be raised, while the delete
program for material documents shall raise a shared lock for the same client.

A new program NSDM_MM_MATBEL_POST_PROCESSING (package
MBND_ARCHIVING) is provided to consolidate the archive representatives (i.e. records
of type ARC_DELTA) that were created by report RM07MADES.Consolidation means
that the key figures of all representatives having the same aggregation key are aggregated
into a single new representative and inserted into the table MATDOC and

                                                                                               Page | 1295
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

MATDOCOIL, while the representatives forming this new representative are deleted
from the table MATDOC and MATDOCOIL.
It must be ensured that the aging and consolidation of archive representatives does not
happen in parallel. For this purpose, the same lock object is used that is already applied to
protect the aging and deletion of material documents (i.e. lock object
EMATDOC_AGING). But as compared to the delete program, where a shared lock is
used to enable the parallel execution of the delete process, the post processing program
shall raise an exclusive lock. By using an exclusive lock it is ensured that the post
processing program is called only once at a time (i.e. it must not run parallel).

Old BAdI implementation for Oil and Gas (OI0_MM_MATBEL_WRITE) is deleted
from the BAdI ARC_MM_MATBEL_WRITE as the BAdI call is inappropriate.

The material documents already present in the customer's archive will still be accessible
as before. There will be no difference from the user perspective between material
documents archived before the changes described and material documents archived after
these changes.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

    Any update to MKPF, MSEG, MSEGO1 & MSEGO2 tables in custom code needs to
         be changed for MATDOC & MATDOCOIL tables correspondingly.

    Custom appends in MKPF & MSEG need to be created in MATDOC table and
         similarly MSEGO1 & MSEGO2 appends in MATDOCOIL table.

    If UoMs were exceeding more than 60, refer & implement SAP note 2293641.

    Select queries on hybrid core & oil tables only for master fetch will be replaced with
         corresponding master data views to improve the performance. For this refer SAP
         note 2328444.

    Any inconsistency between MATDOC & MATDOCOIL will be corrected by running
         report "ROIBSCAN_MISSING_O1O2". Existing inconsistency report of MSEG
         with MSEGO1 & MSEGO2 is modified to check inconsistence between
         MATDOC & MATDOCOIL and update the same. For this refer SAP note
         2328561.

    ADQNT float field of MSEGO2 table has been obsolete due least usage of field. No
         more value available in the field. For this refer SAP note 2328455.

How to Determine Relevancy

This item is relevant for all IS-Oil customer

                                                                                               Page | 1296
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Other Terms

MATDOCOIL, S/4HANA, on-premise,
conversion, MATDOCOILEXTRACT, MATDOCOIL_INDEX, MSEGO1, MSEGO2, R
OIBSCAN_MISSING_O1O2

56.10S4TWL - UoM Group Extension Improvements

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type            Note Number  Note Description
Release Restriction  2396065
                                  S4HANA IS-OIL : UoM Group
Release Restriction  2328459      Enhancement Update authorization
Business Impact      2534454      Issue/OIB05 update failed

                                  S4TWL - Unit of Measure (UoM) Group
                                  enhancement

                                  S4TWL IS-OIL UoM Group
                                  Enhancement 1709

Symptom

WARNING:  This is an IS-OIL specific SAP Note.
          If you DO NOT have IS-OIL installed on your system, this SAP Note does
          not apply to you.
          If you apply this SAP Note and you do not have IS-OIL installed, you may cause
          serious damage to your system

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1709. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

UoM group is the major object in HPM module of IS-OIL. UoM attached to material
decides the additional UoMs for that material. Hence it plays a major role in stock
calculation, document posting and display. In ECC system it is not possible to do any
modification like adition of new UoM, delete or change the existing UoM entries in UoM
group which is already created.

This restriction on UoM group changes, will hamper customer in some typical business
scenarios. So in S/4HANA simplification some relaxation is provided in the feature. Now
customer can add a new UoM into UoM group but not to change/delete the existing
UoMs of the UoM group.

                                               Page | 1297
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Whenever a new UoM added into UoM group, system adjusts the stock with respect to
new UoMs in all the materials which were assigned to that UoM group.

Solution

A report "R_OIB_01_UOM_ADD_INSERT_SUM" is developed to add the new UoM
into the UoM group and adjust the stock for all the materials belonging to UoM group for
the new UoM by inserting summary records.

The report needs to be executed in development, quality and production systems in a
sequence to keep sync between the systems in the landscape.

The report (R_OIB_01_UOM_GRP_EHN_DISPLAY) is developed that gives the output
of summary records created for all the materials assigned to UoM Group which was
enhanced by adding new UoM. And it shows the physical parameters considered for
calculating the summary records, created by, time stamps, and posting date.

Table OIB_UOM_GRP_HIST is updated with change history, Unit of Measure Group,
Version UoM added, Last Changed by and Timestamp and so on.

Other Terms

UoM Group, IS-OIL, Additional UoM

56.11S4TWL - Extended IS-OIL Customizing

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  2534360
                                  S4TWL IS-OIL Template with
                                  technically required BC Set values

Symptom

WARNING:  This is an IS-OIL specific SAP Note.
          If you DO NOT have IS-OIL installed on your system, this SAP Note does not apply
          to you.
          If you apply this SAP Note and you do not have IS-OIL installed, you may cause
          serious damage to your system

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1709. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

                                          Page | 1298
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Reason and Prerequisites

You have installed/upgraded to IS-Oil S/4HANA 1709

Solution

Industry Solution - Oil and Gas (IS-OIL) has created an improved customizing template
which comprises of new Switch Business Configuration Sets. The new customizing
values are delivered as part of S/4HANA 1709 and will only be applicable for the IS-OIL
S/4HANA On-Premise customers. These BC Sets do not contain any ecatts or enterprise
configurations. The intent here is to deliver reference customizing entries to help
consultants configure the system as per their business needs.

Other Terms

BC Sets, Customizing Template

56.12S4TWL - IS-OIL - Commodity Management Integration

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  2534268
                                  S4TWL IS_OIL & Commodity Pricing
                                  Engine Integration 1709

Symptom

WARNING:  This is an IS-OIL specific SAP Note.
          If you DO NOT have IS-OIL installed on your system, this SAP Note does not apply
          to you.
          If you apply this SAP Note and you do not have IS-OIL installed, you may cause
          serious damage to your system

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1709. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

                                                        Page | 1299
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

During the integration of Commodity Pricing Engine in an S/4 IS-OIL System, few
changes were made in order to ensure the smooth functioning of the same, specifically
removing the conflicts with Formula and Average Pricing.

Solution

     OI0_CPE package created to capture changes related to the integration of
         Commodity Pricing Engine. OI0_CPE is assigned to the switch OI0_SERVICE
         and has the super package as IS-OIL-DS.

    Maintain Formula button for the condition type with calculation type(KRECH) =Q
         has been removed and made only for Formula and Average Condition Type in
         both SD and MM side for the transactions vk11,vk12,vk13,mek1,mek2 and mek3.

    Two new BC Sets were created for IS-OIL in the Commodity Pricing Engine
         configuration Tables

    OI_DS_S4DEV_CPEV_CALCRULE(calculation rule configuration)

    OI_DS_S4DEV_CPEV_SURCHARGE(surcharge rule configuration).

For more details on the Core CPE Simplification refer to Simplification Note: 2226096

Other Terms

Average Pricing.

56.13S4TWL - IS-OIL Data Archiving For Exchanges

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  2534442
                                  S4TWL Data Archiving for Exchanges
                                  (Data Archiving Object OIA_EXG)

Symptom

WARNING: This is an IS-OIL specific SAP Note.
                   If you DO NOT have IS-OIL installed on your system, this SAP Note does
                   not apply to you.

                                                                                               Page | 1300
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

                   If you apply this SAP Note and you do not have IS-OIL installed, you may cause
                   serious damage to your system

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1709. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Reason and Prerequisites

In SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1709, IS-OIL can support archiving of Exchange
Agreements.

Solution

Exchange agreements can be archived using the Data Archiving Object OIA_EXG.

All the exchange agreements that has the status of `To be archived' can be archived using
this object.

Note: Exchanges Data Archiving Object OIZ_EXG is responsible only for Exchanges
related tables. If you want to make full use of the object you should perform archiving for
the MM and SD objects first to archive the underlying documents in an exchange
agreement like Sales contracts, Purchase contracts, etc.

Other Terms

Data archiving, OIA_EXG, IS-OIL, Exchanges, OIA, historical data

56.14S4TWL Ł iTSW available only for ACM customers

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS-TSW

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number          Note Description
Business Impact  2572363
                                      S4TWL- iTSW available only for ACM
                                      customers

Symptom

WARNING:  This is an IS-OIL specific SAP Note.

          If you DO NOT have IS-OIL installed on your system, this SAP Note does
          not apply to you.
          If you apply this SAP Note and you do not have IS-OIL installed, you may cause
          serious damage to your system

                                                    Page | 1301
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

You are an iTSW customer and doing a system conversion to SAP S/4 HANA on-
premise edition 1709 FPS01. You face an error "LOG_TSW_ECC is not released for S/4
HANA 1709" during execution of pre-checks or SUM.

Reason and Prerequisites

You face an error during conversion to SAP S/4HANA on-premise edition 1709.

Solution

In general iTSW is not supported in S/4 HANA, the only exception is mentioned below
in this note:

    The note is for ACM customers only, who intend to do a conversion from an ECC
         system to S/4 HANA 1709 FPS01.

    iTSW is not supported in S/4 HANA for new (or greenfield) installations Ł even
         when the target release is an S/4 HANA 1709 FPS01 release.

    For conversion, we do not support any S/4 HANA target release higher than S/4
         HANA 1709 FPS01 (S/4 HANA 1809, 1909 etc.).

Other Terms

LOG_TSW_ECC; LOG_TSW_ECC_1; iTSW; ACM

56.15S4TWL - Service Station Retailing

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS-SSR

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number            Note Description
Business Impact  3009925                S4TWL - Service Station Retailing

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA or an upgrade from
a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and are using the functionality described in
this note. The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item is applicable in this case.

Solution

                                        Page | 1302
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Solution

Description

LE-TRA Shipment Costing Functionality is part of the SAP S/4HANA compatibility
scope, which comes with limited usage rights. For more details on the compatibility
scope and it's expiry date and links to further information please refer to SAP note
2269324. Due to dependency on LE-TRA functionality, LE-TRA specific expiry date is
also valid for this functionality. In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note
2269324, LE-TRA Shipment Costing for Oil & Gas can be found under the ID 127. This
means that you need to migrate from LE-TRA Shipment Costing to its designated
alternative functionality, which is the base variant of SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for

pack license.

Business Process related information

LE-TRA Shipment Costing functionality, which is part of S/4HANA compatibility scope,
includes shipment costing for IS-Oil TD shipment. This calculation is done based on TD
shipment information as well as LE-TRA shipment costing configuration and pricing
condition details. That is part of the LE-TRA solution, which is part of compatibility
scope

Required and Recommended Action(s)

for Transportation Management.

To be able to run the above-mentioned alternative functionality for freight costing of IS-
Oil TD shipment, the corresponding development is planned to do the integration
between IS-Oil TD shipment and Transportation Management. Please refer to
IFR/roadmap explorer for details.

Please refer to SAP note 2270199 for Transportation Management as alternative solution
for LE-TRA.

Currently both solutions (LE-TRA and Base Variant of SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for
Transportation Management) are independent from each other and can be used next to
each other in the same SAP S/4HANA database instance. They are not integrated with
each other. As of expiry date of the compatibility item (LE-TRA shipment costing) any
enhancements or modifications done, will not be available anymore.

SAP S/4HANA TM is already available and can be used as a basic Transportation
Management variant, which comes with the CORE S/4HANA License and covers the
main features of LE-TRA shipment costing. Advanced Transportation Management has
additional features compared to the main features of LE-TRA shipment costing, but
requires additional license.

As well for LE-TRA the main features have already been replaced with the base variant
of SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management.

For convenience here is the link to the corresponding simplification item of LE-TRA
shipment costing for O&G:

56.17S4TWL - Optimization in Oil&Gas - Inter company sales - Cross border
      excise duty

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

                                                                                               Page | 1305
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description
Business Impact  2347421
                              S4TWL - Optimization in Oil & Gas -
                              Inter company sales- Cross border
                              excise duty

Symptom

This is an IS-OIL specific note for the SAP S/4HANA on premise edition 1610 release. If
you do not have IS-OIL, this note doesn't apply to you. This note does not apply to you
if TDP-`Cross-Company/Cross-Border Sales and Stock Transfers' BC set is not
activated in your system

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA on premise edition 1610, the
following SAP S/4HANA note supports inter-company sales- Cross Border Excise duty
movement cancellation.

Reason and Prerequisites

In TDP, Intercompany sales Ł Cross Border Excise duty business process concept of
notional plant is introduced to handle the tax determination, when we perform PGI
against the outbound delivery the following movements will be posted: 601 from
supplying plant, 501(Goods receipt without PO) movement into notional plant & 601
from notional plant

However, when we perform
mateial movement (inter company) cancellation (through VL09), the availability check
will occur at every line item and throws error (deficit of stock) at notional plant.

This will impact 3 different variants

a) delivered; CoT@Load

b) delivered; CoT@Discharge outside TD

c) delivered: Customer Pickup

With the new SAP S/4HANA MM-IM
optimization, single item process as well as array processing is possible.With the single p
rocessing the items will be processed item by item & throws error (deficit of stock).

Solution

                                                                                       Page | 1306
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

The solution for this scenario is by implementing a BADI
`BADI_NSDM_READ_STOCK', which
checks whether there is a notional plant in OIH79 table and if exists,
assign 'A' (array processing) to variable IS_SINGLE_OR_ARRAY which will take care o
f inter company Sales (cross border excise duty) reversal scenarios.

Software components

IS-OIL

How to Determine Relevancy

This item is relevant for all IS-Oil customer

56.18S4TWL Ł Freight Costs

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS-TSW

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number          Note Description
Business Impact  3050713              S4TWL - TSW Freight Costs

Symptom

You are an IS-OIL customer and doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP
S/4HANA or an upgrade from a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and are using
the functionality described in this note. The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification
Item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

TSW Freight Costs Functionality is part of the SAP S/4HANA compatibility scope,
which comes with limited usage rights. For more details on the compatibility scope and
it's expiry date and links to further information please refer to SAP note 2269324.

Due to dependency on LE-TRA functionality, LE-TRA specific expiry date is also valid
for this functionality.

In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note 2269324, TSW Freight Costs for Oil &
Gas can be found under the ID 126.

                                                                                               Page | 1307
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

This means that you need to migrate from Laytime & Demurrage functionality in TSW
Nomination to its designated alternative functionality Ł `Laytime & Demurrage' Fiori
App, before expiry of the compatibility pack license. This note shall provide an overview
on how you can migrate to the alternative functionality.

Business Process related information

TSW Freight Costs functionality, which is part of S/4HANA compatibility scope,
includes Laytime and Demurrage calculation in TSW Nomination. This calculation is
done based on details maintained in freight contract, such as laytime terms, start and end
events for laytime, as well as demurrage rates. Demurrage calculaton is done based on
Shipment Cost Pricing that is part of the LE-TRA solution, which is also part of
compatibility scope.

As of SAP S/4HANA 1809 the alternative functionality for Laytime and Demurrage
calculation is available Ł Fiori Apps F3389 `Schedule Hydrocarbon Trip' and F3390
`Laytime and Demurrage'. With these apps you can calculate laytime, capture related
demurrage costs of a trip and trigger associated follow-up activities. Demurrage
calculation is done based on SD and MM pricing.

You can find more information about functional scope of Laytime & Demurrage
Calculation functionality at help.sap.com.

Please also refer to note 3027954 for information regarding functionality and current
limitations.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

As TSW Freight Costs functionality can be used until the expiry date of the
compatibility pack license, it's up to each customer to decide, when (with which of the
coming SAP S/4HANA releases) they want to migrate to the designated alternative
functionality.

Currently both solutions are independent from each other and can be used next to each
other in the same SAP S/4HANA database instance. They are not integrated with each
other and data for calculated laytime or demurrage is not exchanged.

The new Fiori apps for laytime and demurrage calculation utilize some of the
functionality used also during calculation in TSW Nomination. However, both apps
represent a new solution, including new processes and capabilities.

As of expiry date of the compatibility item (Laytime and Demurrage functionality in
TSW Nomination) any enhancements or modifications done, will not be available
anymore.

Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

56.19S4TWL - Remote Logistics Management

Application Components:IS-OIL-OL

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  3046934
                                  S4TWL - Remote Logistics
                                  Management

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA or an upgrade from
a lower to a higher SAP S/4HANA release and are using the functionality described in
this note. The following SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

SAP Remote Logistics Management (RLM) is part of the SAP S/4HANA compatibility
scope, which comes with limited usage rights. For more details on the compatibility
scope and it's expiry date and links to further information please refer to SAP note
2269324. In the compatibility matrix attached to SAP note 2269324, Remote Logistics
Management can be found under the ID 103.

This means that you cannot use Remote Logistics Management (RLM) after the expiry of
the compatibility pack license. There is an alternative functionality called "Field
Logistics" in SAP S/4HANA. This note shall provide information on what to do to move
to the alternative functionality.

Business Process related information

SAP S/4HANA Field Logistics is part of the SAP Oil & Gas Upstream Cloud scope, as
well as available for private cloud and on premise installations.

Field Logistics is available in the public cloud as of SAP S/4HANA CE1908. It is
available as of SAP S/4HANA OP2022 FPS0 for private cloud and on premise. You can

                                                                                               Page | 1309
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

find information about the functional scope of Field Logistics at help.sap.com. Field
Logistics scenarios are available with the Best Practice Scope items 40G, 4AH, 5OM,
6BA and 6VA.

Please note that Field Logistics requires an extra license.

Required and Recommended Action(s)

As Remote Logistics Management (RLM) can be used until the expiry date of the
compatibility pack license, it's up to each customer to decide when (based on which of
the upcoming SAP S/4HANA releases) they want to implement the designated alternative
functionality.

SAP S/4HANA Field Logistics (FL) is not a direct successor product for RLM, therefore
no direct conversion from Remote Logistics Management (RLM) to Field Logistics is
possible. The recommended approach is to either install Field Logistics in a new SAP
S/4HANA instance, or to ensure FL and RLM are not activated simultaneously in the
same SAP S/4HANA instance. If you are doing a greenfield SAP S/4HANA
implementation, you can achieve this by not activating RLM as a standalone business
function REMOTE_LOGISTICS_MANAGEMENT_I, or as part of
BUSINESS_FUNCTION_BASIS_COM. If you are doing a brownfield migration to
S/4HANA, please consult with your SAP services representatives.

Risks

It is not recommended to have RLM active in the same SAP S/4HANA instance as Field
Logistics, as this can cause data inconsistencies and conflicts within the two products or
with the integration to other functionalities. There could be limited product support for
some scenarios in such a case.

Examples of different integration with other components that needs to be considered and
is a basis for confusions and complications if the two products are active simultaneously:

    RLM is integrated with Warehouse Management (WM, which is also on the
         compatibility scope), whereas FL is integrated with embedded Extended
         Warehouse Management (EWM).

    RLM works with LE-TRA shipments. FL works with LE-SHP and EWM deliveries
         and offers an API-based integration with other solutions; in future releases it is
         planned to work with Transportation Management.

    FL and RLM both integrate with the EAM maintenance order, therefore both FL and
         RLM processes might be triggered, leading to conflicts.

                                                                                               Page | 1310
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Any inconsistencies arising out of activating RLM and FL in the same S/4HANA
instance would be the responsibility of the implementation project team.

Other options

If you choose an approach of gradual migration, it is best to keep RLM and FL in
separate instances. The RLM process would remain in the current instance, whereas FL
would be moved to the new instance. There will be a need for interfaces in the interim,
for example in the areas of FI, IM. Field Logistics is based on assigned organizational
structure of supply and demand plants (base and remote plants). Therefore, it is good to
migrate whole sets of plants within a supply network at the same time to avoid
complications that arise with inventory reconciliation and process consistency.

If you cannot avoid having RLM and FL activated in the same SAP S/4HANA instance,
be advised about the associated risks and complications. To mitigate the risk, the project
team needs to carry out a detailed risk and impact analysis to arrive at the best solution
approach for each specific project. This is especially valid for brownfield SAP S/4HANA
implementations. Therefore, the recommended approach is to engage SAP as a "Design
Authority".

Other Terms

SAP S/4HANA, Compatibility Scope, Compatibility Package, System Conversion,
Upgrade, Remote Logistics Management, Oil&Gas

56.20S4TWL - IS-OIL Proper sign operation for ACDOCA

Application Components:IS-OIL-DS

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number      Note Description
Business Impact  2350150
                                  IS-OIL Proper sign operation for
                                  ACDOCA

Symptom
You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1610. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.
Reason and Prerequisites
In SAP S/4HANA proper sign operation is adapted for ACDOCA.

                                                                                               Page | 1311
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Solution

In SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1610, IS-OIL can support a sign operation in
ACDOCA. Where required, automated logic is in place and executed automatically in
case a customer converts the current SAP Business Suite system into SAP S/4HANA, on-
premise edition 1610.

Nevertheless there might be constellations where a customer needs to be aware about. For
example:

    Any FI Posting happened in the system Excise duty values come with sign operation,
         Condition credit indicator `H' with negative values posting can see in ACDOCA

Overview

With SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1610, posting proper sign operation adapted in
ACDOCA.

Posting any FI document with Credit Indicator `H', negative sign values applied to
posting document and Debit indicator `S' there is no sign-operation applied.

Posting proper sign to ACDOCA we implemented BADI
`BADI_OIL_ACDOCA_POST_SIGN' and with Implementing Class
`CL_OIL_ACDOCA_POST_SIGN'.

Coding part done in above class using interface method
IF_BADI_FINS_ACDOC_POST_EV_INT~SUBST_ACDOCA_EXTENSION_FIELDS

  .

System Behavior Depending on the IS-Oil Switch

If the IS-OIL functionality is switched on, then only proper sign operation posting into
ACDOCA.
