Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

SAP EDM (Energy Data Management) provides a transaction for monitoring the import
of profile data from external sources into the SAP EDM data repository. The former
transaction EDM1 has been replaced by the new transaction EDM1N that provides more
functional features, improved enhancement capabilities and improved user interfaces.

Usage of SAP EDM and specifically import of EDM profile data is indicated by entries
in table EEDMIMPORTLOG_DB (checked via transaction SE16).

For using the new transaction EDM1N, activation of ISU_EDM_1 is required.

Business Process related information

No change in business process

Transaction not available in SAP EDM1
S/4HANA on-premise edition 1511

62.12S4TWL - Prepayment solution for the utilities industry

Application Components:IS-U-BI

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number    Note Description
Business Impact  3375865
                                S4TWL - Prepayment solution for the
                                utilities industry

Symptom

                                                                                       Page | 1463
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

You are doing a system conversion or an upgrade to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1 or
higher. You are using prepayment functionality within IS-U Billing. The following SAP
S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

Prepayment and prepayment meters are applied in different countries and utilities
markets since a long time. SAP delivered a first solution based on SAP ERP and several
years later a second solution called SAP Prepayment for Utilities. The first prepayment
solution will be now deprecated, and IS-U customers are asked to implement and use
SAP Prepayment for Utilities instead of the old solution.

This deprecation is relevant for you if you have entries in database table EPPMHEADER.

Business Process related information

Following programs and transactions are not supported anymore:

EPREPAY (Amount Mgmt of Prepayment Meter)
EPREPAY_RELEASE (Release locked PPM entries)
EPREPAYFREE (Release locked PPM entries)
ISU_PPM_JOB_NR (Number Range Maintenance: PPM_JOB_NR)
EPPM (Number Range Maintenance: PPM_JOB_NR)
S_XB3_95000002 (IMG Activity: _ISUCSPPM_000002)
ESARA09 (IS-U Archiving: Prepayment Documents)
ESARJ09 (ArchInfStructure: Prepayment Active)

62.13S4TWL - Utilities customer score for SAP Marketing Cloud

Application Components:IS-U-CS-MA

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number       Note Description
Business Impact  3422783
                                   S4TWL - Deprecation of Utilities
                                   customer score and SOA services for
                                   SAP Marketing Cloud

Symptom

The SOA services UtilitiesInteractionCreateRequest_Out and
UtilitiesScoreBulkReplicateRequest_Out and the determination of the utilities customer

                                                                                               Page | 1464
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

score (BRFplus application ISU_MKT_FINANCIAL_HEALTH_SCORE), available
since release SAP S/4HANA 2020, are deprecated and shall not be used anymore on SAP
S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 or higher releases.

You are doing an upgrade to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 or higher. You are using the
SOA services UtilitiesScoreBulkUtilitiesInteractionCreateRequest_Out and
ReplicateRequest_Out, the later to create and transfer the utilities customer score. You
are using the BRFplus application ISU_MKT_FINANCIAL_HEALTH_SCORE to
determine the utilities customer score. ISU_MKT_FINANCIAL_HEALTH_SCORE. The
following SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

The SOA service UtilitiesScoreBulkReplicateRequest_Out contains a special feature.
Upon service execution, a utilities customer score for a business partner is determined
and sent by this SOA service. This is a utilities specific approach that is only very loosely
integrated with FI-CA information and processes. The concept of FI-CA
creditworthiness provides higher capabilities and value to the users of SAP S/4HANA
Utilities.

The SOA service UtilitiesScoreBulkReplicateRequest_Out and the determination of the
utilities customer score (BRFplus
application ISU_MKT_FINANCIAL_HEALTH_SCORE) are deprecated. Instead please
use FI-CA creditworthiness. Information about the transfer of the creditworthiness out of
SAP S/4HANA is described here. The FI-CA rating can be replicated to SAP Credit
Management, details here.

The SOA service UtilitiesInteractionCreateRequest_Out has been specifically designed
for the integration of SAP S/4HANA Utilities and SAP Marketing Cloud. It will be not
considered for the integration of SAP S/4HANA Utilities with SAP Emarsys or SAP
Customer Data Platform. If you are using UtilitiesInteractionCreateRequest_Out for the
integration of SAP S/4HANA Utilities with another third party application, you must
exchange UtilitiesInteractionCreateRequest_Out either by your own custom specific API
or request for an API via SAP Customer Influence.

Other Terms

IS-U, Marketing Cloud, Utilities Customer Score

62.14S4TWL - Machine Learning Scenario for Utilities Billing
Application Components:IS-U-BI

                                                              Page | 1465
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Related Notes:    Note Number  Note Description
                  3480987
 Note Type                     S4TWL - Performance in IS-U Machine
 Business Impact               Learning for outsorted billing documents

Symptom

The training of the machine learning model for outsorted billing documents
(UTI_BI_OUTSORTED) terminates due to problems with the memory requirement or
due to runtime reasons.
In the application log for the object ISLM (transaction SLG1), there is an unusually high
memory requirement.

This SAP Note changes the machine learning solution for outsorted billing documents to
the new model UTI_BI_OUTSRTD_DOC. The previous model is no longer used.

The previous scenario UTI_BI_OUTSORTED and the associated model
UTI_BI_OUTSORTED are deleted with release SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS00.

(SAP Note 3345830 "Machine Learning for IS-U Billing" already mentions possible
problems when using the previous model.)

Reason and Prerequisites

In the previous solution, values from the interim billing were not saved. Determining the
statistics is very extensive and leads to a high memory requirement and a long runtime.
This SAP Note significantly improves the memory requirement and the runtime behavior.
The solution works in a similar way to machine learning for implausible meter readings.

Solution

For SAP releases SAP S/4HANA 2023 or lower:
Install APL version APL 4.203 SP 2405. For the availability of the APL version, check
the related SAP Note 2631182.
Important: The SAP HANA database must be restarted to register the corresponding C++
libraries.

Now import the relevant support package.

To use the new machine learning model UTI_BI_OUTSRTD_DOC for outsorted billing
documents, proceed as follows:

                                                                                       Page | 1466
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

    Set the period for the machine learning application in the maintenance view
         (transaction SM30) TEML_OUTBILPARAM in the same way as before.

    Start the report REML_FILL_OUTBILCHAR ("Determine ML Characteristics for
         outsorted Billing Documents") to precalculate the characteristic values. Then
         execute the calculation for the documents that have already been resolved. To do
         this, select the "Historical Results" checkbox.
         The precalculated characteristic values are now stored in the database table
         TEML_OUTBILCHAR.

    Start the Fiori Launchpad. The role SAP_BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST is
         assigned to you.
         Under Analytics, open the Fiori app "Intelligent Scenario Management" with the
         scenario "UTI_BI_OUTSRTD_DOC".

    Train and activate the model.
         A corresponding active model version is visible. This completes the machine
         learning preparation.

    Now apply machine learning to outsorted billing documents that have not yet been
         resolved.
         To do this, start the report REML_FILL_OUTBILCHAR with the "Current
         Results" checkbox set.
         The report now calculates the characteristic values and stores them in the database
         table TEML_OUTBILCHAR. The number of records processed is displayed.

    Start the report REML_BILLING_OUTSRTD_RELPRED to calculate the release
         confidence values in the same way as before.
         Note: The report directly uses the new model UTI_BI_OUTSRTD_DOC with the
         new version. The old model (UTI_BI_OUTSORTED) is not intended to be used.

    In the Fiori Launchpad, start the "Resolve Outsorted Billing Documents" app to
         display the result of the release confidence calculation.

Other Terms

Outsorted billing, machine learning, IS-U, training

62.15S4TWL - Substitution of IS-U Backlog Reduction Engine by BPEM

Application Components:IS-U-BI, IS-U

Related Notes:

d.html?locale=en-US&q=BPEM

SAP Multichannel Foundation for Utilities and Public Sector provides a set of
standardized and reusable OData services that consist of self-service scenarios that enable
customers to securely access and manage key account information and perform important
self-service activities online, like bill payment, entering meter readings, creating
inquiries, sending requests to a utility company and so on. More information is avaliable
in the Innovation Discovery, innovation "SAP Multichannel Foundation for Utilities and
Public Sector software and SAP S/4HANA: self-services for end customers", link:
https://go.support.sap.com/innovationdiscovery/#/innovation/6CAE8B26E4CB1EE5BEC
CBB48AF5EF298

62.17S4TWL - IS-U Stock, Transaction and Master Data Statistics (UIS, BW)

                  2270505
 Note Type                     S4TWL - IS-U Stock, Transaction and
 Business Impact               Master Data Statistics (UIS, BW)

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

IS-U Stock and Transaction Statistics based on Logistics Information System (LIS) is not
available within SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1511. Successor functionality: CDS
view based virtual data model for Utilities (see documentation
https://help.sap.com/viewer/6b356c79dea443c4bbeeaf0865e04207/1709%20000/en-
US/dde1c356a3386a15e10000000a441470.html and
https://go.support.sap.com/innovationdiscovery/#/innovation/6CAE8B27FCC31EE6A08
0E3EEE0531B00) and SAP BW/4HANA content for Utilities (see documentation
https://help.sap.com/viewer/06e872f914a44d77b6c692b0273ca400/1.0.1/en-
US/a3e19257660b6c10e10000000a441470.html). Please check the documentation for the
availability of the successors.

The corresponding functionality and transactions can be found in SAP Business Suite in
the SAP Easy Access menu under "Utilities Industry" - "Information System" - "Utlities
Information System" - "Stock Statistics" and "Transaction Statistics", respectively. In
SAP S/4HANA, "Stock Statistics" and "Transaction Statistics" are not available anymore.
Following transactions are not available in SAP S/4HANA:

EI35              Set up stock statistics
EP01              Customizing: Transaction Statistics
EP02              Customizing: Stock Statistics

Usage of UIS is indicated by entries in database tables TE789C and TE790C with
ACTIVE field set to `X'. If no entries exist, this note is not relevant for you. The check
can be done via transaction SE16.

62.18S4TWL - IS-U Sales Processing

Application Components:IS-U

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

Solution

Description

IS-U Sales Processing is not available within SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1511.

Transactions ISU_SALES_QUOTATION - Create Sales Quotation -
and ISU_SALES_ORDER - Create Sales Order - are not available in SAP S/4HANA.

Usage of IS-U Sales Processing is indicated by entries in database table
ESALES_PRODSALES. If there are no entries, this note is not relevant for you.

Note Type        Note Number  Note Description

                              S4TWL - Utility & Telco related
                              Business Functions

Symptom

You are doing a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition. The following
SAP S/4HANA Transition Worklist item is applicable in this case.

                              Page | 1477
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Solution

Description

As of SAP S/4HANA 1610 (components FI-CA 801 and IS-UT 801) the localization
Add-On CEEISUT for Telco and Utilities industries is retrofitted into SAP S/4HANA -
see the release strategy SAP Note 1014997. Appends of DDIC objects enhancing core
structures and tables shipped with the CEEISUT have become switchable. Therefore it is
necessary to have these Switches switched on (in active state) before upgrade to
S/4HANA in order to avoid any data loss.

A customer using CEEISUT need to ensure that a dedicated Business Function Set is
active before he converts his system to SAP S/4HANA - either UTILITIES or TELCO.

The related pre-check (see the SAP Note 2314696) raises an error when CEEISUT Add-
On is installed and none of the following Business Function Sets is in active state or any
its underlying object (Business Function, Switch, Package) is not present in an active
version in a system or any of Business Functions or Switches is not in active state. See
the hierarchy of both Business Function Sets below.

Business Function Set 'UTILITIES':

Business Function /SAPCE/ISU_LOC_CEE

          Switch /SAPCE/ISU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02

             Switch Package /SAPCE/IU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02

          Switch /SAPCE/FICA_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02

             Switch Package SAPCE/FK_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02

Business Function ISU_UTIL_WASTE

          Switch /SAPCE/ISU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

             Switch Package /SAPCE/IU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

          Switch /SAPCE/FICA_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

             Switch Package /SAPCE/FK_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

Business Function Set 'TELCO':

Business Function /SAPCE/TEL_LOC_CEE

Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

              Switch /SAPCE/FICA_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02
                      Switch Package /SAPCE/FK_LOC_CEE_SFWS_02

    Business Function /SAPCE/TEL_LOC_CEE_HIDDEN
             Switch /SAPCE/ISU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01
                      Switch Package /SAPCE/IU_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

    Business Function RM_CA

                      Switch Package /SAPCE/FK_LOC_CEE_SFWS_01

63.SAP Ariba

63.1 S4TWL - Ariba Cloud Integration

Application Components:BNS-ARI-TRF

Related Notes:

Note Type        Note Number          Note Description
Business Impact  2400737
                                      Ariba Cloud Integration Solutions for
                                      SAP: Supported SAP Product Versions

                                                                                       Page | 1479
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

Symptom

You are planning to use SAP and Ariba Solutions integrated with Integration
    Adapters provided by the SAP Ariba Cloud Integration program, or you are
    already live with it and are considering an upgrade of one of the solutions. To
    plan your project, you need to know the supported versions and constraints with
    respect to upgrades.

During upgrade or conversion check, an error is issued in check class
    CLS4SIC_ARIBA_CI_CHECK (RC = 7): Go to Solution -> Information for
    upgrade and conversion

Reason and Prerequisites

You are using or you are planning to use the Ariba Cloud Integration Solution (CI), that
you can download from Ariba Connect. Or you are planning to use the Ariba Cloud
Integration Gateway (CIG) Add-On for SAP ERP or S/4HANA.

This note is not relevant for integration solutions provided by the 'Ariba Integration Suite'
(Add-On) that you can download from the SAP Service Marketplace.

Solution

The following SAP Product versions are supported with Ariba Cloud Integration:

CI-Version                  CI-6 CI-7 CI-8 CI-9 CI-9 CI-9 CIG*

                                                                                       Page | 1480
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

SAP S/4HANA 2021 OnPremise                                                             X

SAP S/4HANA 2022 OnPremise                                                             X

SAP S/4HANA 2023 OnPremise                                                             X

* Note that some integration scenarios require a minimum EHP Version. Refer to the
documentation of your CI Version X on the required EHP Versions for scenarios in your
implemenation scope.

You must not use an Ariba Cloud Integration Version with a non-supported SAP Product
Version.

IMPORTANT: Consider the follwing information if you are planning to upgrade your
SAP Product.

If you haven't done this already, you should consider upgrading to the Ariba Cloud
Integration Gateway (CIG). This will avoid the potential conflicts described below. CIG
is the unique integration solution going forward and no further development for other
solutions will be made, and product maintenance will be ending after a certain period.

Information for upgrade and conversion

You can only upgrade to a SAP Product Version that is supported by the Ariba Cloud Integration
     program. Some integration scenarios will be broken if you upgrade to a non-supported SAP
     Product Version. Support is not granted by SAP Ariba for any inquiries related to such
     incidents.

SAP Ariba delivered the Cloud Integration programs (CI-9) through SAP transport files within an
     exclusive namespace registered with SAP. The solution is supported by SAP Ariba as per the
     Ariba Support policy (see section below 'Supported Versions for CI'). However, due to the
     nature of transport objects, the programs are considered as customer objects during upgrade
     with Software Update Manager (SUM). During the upgrade, you have to ensure that Ariba
     Objects including table contents are retained. Due to their origin from transport files, Ariba
     Objects can get deleted during an upgrade. To avoid this, make sure that note 2402191 is
     applied in your system, if you want to continue using this solution.

During upgrades and conversions, a detailed check is executed by Software Update Manager
     (SUM). In case that CI objects can be found in the system, that have been imported through
     transport files (for example CI-9), the check returns error code RC = 7. In this case, you have
     to confirm that you have either migrated to CIG already or that you have run the report
     attached to note 2402191. You can confirm this by adding an exemption to the check result.
     This procedure is described in detail here: https://blogs.sap.com/2018/03/26/sap-s4hana-
     simplification-item-check-how-to-do-it-right./

After you have migrated to CIG, you do not longer need to run run the report attached to note
     2402191 prior to upgrades. CI objects, that have been imported through transport files (for
     example CI-9) will be deleted during the next upgrade.

# Supported Versions for CI:

                                                                                       Page | 1481
Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Private Edition 2023 Ł Feature Pack Stack 3

With SAP's standard integration platform released with SAP Ariba Cloud Integration
Gateway (CIG) to integrate SAP Ariba solutions with SAP ERP systems, previous
integration tools such as Cloud Integration (CI) and Business Suite Add-On are no
longer available for new installations and no further enhancements will be made. At this
time, only CI-9 version is the only supported version for break fixes while previous CI
versions are deprecated and no longer supported.

* CIG Support Pack - Support Policy:
To adhere with the standard SAP support model, SAP Ariba will only support the current (version N)
and the version preceding the current version (version N-1) for the SAP Ariba Cloud Integration
Gateway. CIG has 3 components ARBCI1, ARBCI2 & ARBCIGR and each of these components
could be at different SP level. Current version is determined from the component with highest Support
Pack level.

For example, with the support package SP 0008 release, ARBCI1 is SP008 while
ARBCI2 is SP006 and ARBCIGR is SP0001 and SAP Ariba supports the following
versions:
Ę Current released version (version n) Ł for example, ARBCI1: SP 0008
Ę Preceding released version (version n-1)Ł for example, ARBCI1: SP 0007
SAP Ariba recommends that customers must always upgrade to the latest SP release that
is available at GA (General Availability) / RTC (Released To customer). The new
releases always include additional enhancements and new features and customers can
benefits from these functionalities.
Other Terms
Cloud Integration CI-9 CI-8 CI-7 CI-6 Upgrade CIG SI01 Ariba Cloud Integ
